title: Campaign Wiring Hub
text: Developer hub: start/complete quests for wiring and testing.
imagePrompt: A small wooden table with maps, tokens, and a ledger of quest hooks.

title: Autowire: Quest Start/Complete Hub
text: Autowire hub: start and complete any quest for testing.
imagePrompt: A cluttered table with quest sheets and ribbons for testing hooks.

title: Postern Gate: Banner Under Cloak
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, returning through postern gate with bundled banner, lantern code flash, rain, cinematic, no text
description:
The banner is heavier than cloth should be.

The guards stare as if you carried a piece of tomorrow.

Captain Harl arrives, breathless.

title: Barracks: The City Hears a Rumour
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, barracks with soldiers whispering, bundled banner on table, captain gesturing, cinematic, no text
description:
Word spreads faster than arrows.

Some beg you to show it.

Some beg you to hide it.

Harl watches your face for the decision.

talk.text: Harl is blunt: the people are brittle right now.

choices.label: Bring the matter to the council immediately.

title: Council Chamber: Banner Policy
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, council chamber with black banner bundle on map table, officials arguing, cinematic, no text
description:
Vayne’s eyes flick to the banner.

"Symbols are weapons," she says.

"Decide how we wield this one."

talk.text: Vayne will issue emergency authority either way.

title: Mage Tower: The Great Assault Foretold
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, mage tower chamber, crystal ball showing siege tower and ram, anxious scribes, cinematic, no text
description:
Salenne turns the crystal ball.

Images rotate: a siege tower, a ram, water churning under streets.

"Within the day," she says. "Their biggest push."

talk.text: Salenne offers you one clear advantage: foreknowledge.

choices.label: Go to the battlements: the Great Assault begins.

title: The Horns
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, city gate in storm rain, horns blowing, soldiers rushing, cinematic, no text
description:
A horn bellows from the wall — then another answers from the fields.

Rain turns to needles. Somewhere beyond sight, something huge moves.

Captain Roth shouts: "TO YOUR POSTS! THIS IS IT!"

choices.label: Run to the ward plinth near the gate.
Climb to the parapet post to support archers.

title: Hold the Barricade
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, defenders behind barricade, goblins charging in rain, torchlight, cinematic, no text
description:
The first wave hits like a thrown sack of knives.

Your barricade teams look to you — not because you’re in charge, but because you’re still standing.

title: Rain and Arrows
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, close combat at barricade, arrows and shields, chaos, cinematic, no text
description:
The enemy closes. Archers fire past your shoulder.

If your preparations mattered, you’ll feel it now.

choices.label: Support with bow fire (and retreat behind cover).
Plant spikes at the choke point.
Cast Stonebind to slow the wave.

title: The Line Holds
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, defenders pushing back goblins, broken shields, victory moment, cinematic, no text
description:
The first press breaks — not cleanly, not kindly — but it breaks.

Captain Roth’s runner screams over the din: "SAPPERS! AT THE WARD PLINTH!"

title: Ward Crisis
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, ward plinth under attack, goblin sappers with fuse, defenders panicking, cinematic, no text
description:
A goblin sapper team rushes the plinth, fuse cords in hand.

If the ward fails, the gate becomes a suggestion.

title: Fuses in the Rain
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, close-up sapper lighting fuse, arrows flying, rain steam, cinematic, no text
description:
One sapper shields a spark. Another laughs.

You have seconds.

choices.label: Shoot the sapper with the fuse.
Soak the fuse with a water skin.
Cast Flare Signal to rally defenders and panic the sappers.

title: Ward Saved
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, ward plinth glowing stable, defenders relieved, broken fuse on stone, cinematic, no text
description:
The fuse dies. The ward hum steadies.

A mage-priest grips your shoulder hard enough to bruise. "You kept the gate alive."

choices.label: Return to the parapet for the next wave.

title: Parapet Volley
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, archers firing from parapet into storm, enemies below as silhouettes, cinematic, no text
description:
Archers loose volleys into the storm.

If you stocked the barrels earlier, the firing doesn’t slow. If you didn’t… hands reach for empty air.

choices.label: Support the archers (spend 1 bundle of arrows if you have it).
If the parapet is stocked, coordinate volleys.

title: Triage Under Lanterns
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, triage tent near gate, lanterns, healers, wounded soldiers, rain outside, cinematic, no text
description:
Healers work fast. Bandages run red.

A runner arrives with a message: "The first wave is only a test. The real push is coming."

choices.label: Steel yourself for the next phase of the battle.

title: The Real Push
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, massive enemy wave in rain, drums, torches, silhouettes of orcs and a troll, city gate looming, cinematic, no text
description:
Drums thud like a second heart.

The field erupts with torches and black shapes — orcs in tight ranks, and behind them something huge that lumbers as if the world owes it space.

A runner screams: "THEY’RE PUSHING THE RAM! AND SOMETHING’S INSIDE THE WALLS!"

choices.label: Run to the gate face and join the defenders.
Run to the gate mechanisms (emergency access).
Hunt the infiltrators inside the walls.

title: Gate Face
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, defenders at gate with shields, arrows raining, huge ram approaching, cinematic, no text
description:
A battering ram surges forward under a roof of shields.

If the ward holds, the ram hits like a blunt prayer. If it fails, it hits like a verdict.

choices.label: If the gate is warded, focus fire on the ram crew.
If the ward is weak, brace for impact and prepare to fall back.

title: Arrowstorm
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, arrow volleys from parapet, orcs pushing forward, rain streaks, cinematic, no text
description:
The ram crew advances in a tight wedge.

Your choices are simple: thin them out, slow them down, or meet them when they hit.

choices.label: Cast Stonebind to slow the front ranks.
Fight when they reach the line.

title: A Cracked Moment
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, gate shaking, defenders grimacing, ward glow straining, cinematic, no text
description:
The ram hits. The ward flares. The gate shudders.

You hear it — a crack that isn’t wood. It’s certainty.

choices.label: Sprint to the gate mechanisms to reinforce the lift chains.
Stay and hold one more impact.

title: Breach Risk
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, troll brute pushing forward, orcs yelling, gate splintering, cinematic, no text
description:
A troll brute crashes into the press like a living siege engine.

Defenders stumble. Someone screams: "THE HINGE!"

title: Hinge and Chain
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, close view of gate hinge and chain under strain, defenders fighting in rain, cinematic, no text
description:
If the chain holds, the gate holds.

If the chain slips, the city becomes a maze of last stands.

choices.label: Use a resin patch to reinforce the hinge seam.
Fight through the press and buy time.
Fall back to the inner streets and organize a choke point.

title: Splinters and Smoke
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, gate splintering, smoke and rain, defenders retreating, cinematic, no text
description:
You win seconds — not safety.

The gate gives a handspan. Then another.

A narrow breach opens. Enough for knives. Enough for screams.

choices.label: Fall back to the inner streets to prevent a full spill-in.
Last chance: run to the mechanisms to lift and slam the portcullis.

title: Mechanism Door
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, iron door to gate mechanisms, guards, sparks, rumbling gate, cinematic, no text
description:
An iron door set into the inner wall.

A guard blocks you. "Only the Gatewarden—"

The wall shakes. Dust sifts down like slow snow.

choices.label: No seal—fall back to the inner streets.

title: Gate Mechanisms
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, gate mechanism room with chains and winch, sparks, defenders straining, cinematic, no text
description:
Chains groan. A winch screams. The portcullis is half-raised — stuck between fate and physics.

A crewman shouts: "Something’s cutting the ropes from inside!"

choices.label: Use a chain hook to re-seat the slipping chain (risky).
Cast Wardseal to steady the mechanism room’s ward-lines.
Ignore the chain—hunt whoever is cutting from inside.

title: Ropes Cut From Within
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, narrow inner-wall tunnel, goblin infiltrators with knives, hanging ropes, cinematic, no text
description:
A narrow service tunnel runs inside the wall.

Goblin infiltrators — soaked, laughing — slash at rope lines like children ruining toys.

One drops something that clinks: a key fragment.

title: Knives on Ropes
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, close fight in tunnel, goblins slashing ropes, sparks and rain drip, cinematic, no text
description:
If they finish cutting, the portcullis drops crooked — and jams open.

You must stop them now.

choices.label: Shoot and retreat to keep distance in the tunnel.
Use a smoke pellet to break line of sight and rush them.

title: A Slam of Iron
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, portcullis slamming down, sparks, defenders cheering briefly, cinematic, no text
description:
The last rope holds.

The portcullis drops clean.

For a heartbeat, the city breathes.

choices.label: Return to the inner yard and see what remains.

title: Infiltrator Alert
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, inner alley with panicked citizens, guard pointing, shadowy movement, cinematic, no text
description: A guard points into an alley. "They’re inside! They cut ropes and open doors — they want the gate to fail from within!"

choices.label: Chase them into the inner wall tunnel.
Fall back to organize inner street choke points.

title: Dawn Square: Smoke and Applause
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, dawn in city square, soot in air, civilians cheering and grieving, guards tired, cinematic, no text
description:
Dawn finds the city standing.

Some cheer because they must.

Some weep because they can.

Your name moves through the crowd like a rumor becoming fact.

choices.label: Go to the council for aftermath orders.
Visit the Armourers’ Guild for veteran crafting access.
Visit the Scribes’ Conclave for veteran spell access.

title: Council Afterbattle: The Next Knife
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, council chamber with scorched maps and wax seals, morning light, cinematic, no text
description:
The council speaks in numbers:

Casualties.
Supplies.
Repair time.

Vayne speaks in outcomes:

"They retreated. They will return—unless we make retreat expensive."

talk.text: Politics begins the moment the swords stop.

choices.label: Depart the city to pursue the enemy retreat.

title: Barracks Report: Ash Ledger
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, barracks desk with casualty lists, soot-stained captain, cinematic, no text
description:
Captain Harl’s desk is a battlefield of paper.

A city can be saved and still wounded.

He looks up as you arrive.

talk.text: Harl speaks plainly: consequences are a kind of enemy.

title: Armourers’ Guild: Veteran Work
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, busy forge with armor pieces and guildmaster, sparks, cinematic, no text
description:
The guild doesn’t applaud.

It measures.

Hammer marks. Stitch lines. Fit.

This is where veterans become harder to kill.

talk.text: Orrow judges you with a craftsman’s eyes.

title: Scribes’ Conclave: Ink That Bites
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, scribe hall with scroll racks and glowing runes, quiet intensity, cinematic, no text
description:
The air smells like ink and burnt lavender.

Quiet people doing loud work.

Luvara doesn’t waste words.

talk.text: Luvara offers sanctioned power.

title: Council Hall: War Map Chamber
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, medieval council war room, candlelit map table, tired officials, cinematic, no text
description:
Candles gutter over a map scratched with siege lines.

A clerk dips his quill in ink like it’s blood.

Councilor Vayne gestures you in. "Report."

talk.text: Vayne’s gaze is a blade.

title: Quartermaster Depot
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, crate-stacked depot, soldiers hauling bundles, quartermaster with ledger, cinematic, no text
description:
Crates rise like walls.

Quartermaster Brevin barks numbers at runners.

A sign reads: WORK EARNS WHAT COIN CAN’T.

talk.text: Brevin looks up without smiling.

choices.label: Trade Work Contract Tokens for gear (opens shop exchange).

title: Mage Tower: Scribes’ Room
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, mage tower scribes room, scroll racks, glowing runes, scribes writing fast, cinematic, no text
description:
Quills scratch like insects.

Scribe Orrin stacks blank vellum beside rune-lamps.

"If you brought scrolls," he says, "you brought time."

talk.text: Orrin barely looks up.

title: Armoury Workroom
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, armoury sewing benches, leather panels, awls, tired workers, cinematic, no text
description:
Leather panels, needles, rivets.

A master cobbler points at a pile: "Stitch straight. Loose seams kill."

craft.text: You can assist with stitching and fitting.

title: Battlements Post
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, battlements in drizzle, archers, stacked arrows, distant siege fires, cinematic, no text
description:
Archers stand in wet silence.

Beyond the fields, siege fires glow like coals.

A runner takes your bundle and nods once. "Good. Again."

choices.label: Complete the delivery for Battlement Runs (if active).

title: Sewer Gate: Below the City’s Breath
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, iron sewer gate opened into darkness, lantern glow, damp stone, cinematic, no text
description:
The air changes at the sewer gate.

Above: smoke, sweat, and war.

Below: wet stone and older secrets.

choices.label: Begin the descent into the underways.

title: Sewer Junction: Three Flows
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, sewer junction with three channels, drifting debris, lantern reflections, cinematic, no text
description:
Three channels diverge.

One smells of rot.

One smells of mushrooms.

One smells… clean. Too clean.

choices.label: Follow the rot channel (rats and swarms).
Follow the ‘too clean’ channel (someone lives down here).

title: Sewer Run: Teeth in the Dark
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, rats swarming across wet stones, lantern light, boots splashing, cinematic, no text
description:
Rats pour from cracks.

You can run, fight, or climb to a maintenance ledge.

choices.label: Run hard and lose them (take 1 damage).

title: Ratcatcher Nook
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, small sewer nook with dry platform, rat traps, lantern, a figure waiting, cinematic, no text
description:
A dry platform. Traps. A lantern that doesn’t flicker.

Pella watches you like you’re the danger.

"You want the old underways? Then talk."

talk.text: Pella taps a hooked pole on stone.

choices.label: Proceed to the old underways threshold.

title: Underway Threshold: Old Stone, Older Wards
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, ancient stone archway under city, faint glowing ward lines, cinematic, no text
description:
An archway cut with precise stonework.

Faint ward-lines shimmer when your lantern passes.

Pella whispers: "Don’t step on the bright lines."

choices.label: Use ward salt to reveal safe steps (reduces risk).
Proceed without ward salt (risk a ward sting).

title: Echo Caves: The Sound of Footsteps
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, cavern where every drip echoes, chalky stone, distant shapes, cinematic, no text
description:
Every step echoes too long.

Something hears you.

Something moves where echoes don’t reach.

choices.label: Shadows resolve into thralls—avoid or fight.

title: Fungal Grove: Breath Held
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, glowing fungi grove, spores in air like dust motes, eerie beauty, cinematic, no text
description:
Glowing fungi like lanterns that hate you.

Spores drift.

Pella’s advice returns: hold your breath.

choices.label: Drink fungal tonic (if you have one) to resist spores.

title: Ward Shrine: Lumen Fragment
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, small shrine with glowing crystal fragment embedded, old ward carvings, cinematic, no text
description:
A small shrine. Wards carved like handwriting.

A crystal fragment sits in the center—part of a key.

Taking it may wake the shrine’s guardians.

title: Basalt Steps: Under-Fortress Descent
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, descending basalt stairs into ancient fortress, cold blue light, cinematic, no text
description:
Basalt steps descend into a place built for war long before your city existed.

Below: warders.

Below: a vault door that remembers being closed.

title: Chamber of Seals: Second Fragment
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, sealed chamber with crystal fragment in ironwork, ward glyphs, cinematic, no text
description:
The chamber is all seals and silence.

A second key fragment is mounted in ironwork.

A faint hum resonates in your teeth.

title: Gallery: The Glass Eye
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, fortress gallery with hanging charms and bones, shaman silhouette, crystal glint, cinematic, no text
description:
Charms sway without wind.

A shaman’s eye glints like glass.

"You come for the city’s sight," it says.

"Then pay in fear."

choices.label: Fight the Shaman of the Glass Eye.

title: Shaman’s Relics: Third Fragment and Shard
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, fallen shaman, crystal shard and key fragment on cloth, eerie blue glow, cinematic, no text
description:
The shaman’s charms fall silent.

You take the third fragment.

You also take a shard of scrying crystal—proof the vault holds the real prize.

choices.label: Go to the Lumen Vault Door.

title: The Lumen Vault Door
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, massive vault door with crystal keyholes, faint ward glow, cinematic, no text
description:
A door built to outlast kings.

Three key sockets wait.

If you have the fragments, the door will remember how to open.

choices.label: Insert the 3 fragments and unlock the vault.
You lack fragments—retreat and search for more.

title: Lumen Vault: The City’s Sight
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, glowing crystal vault chamber, crystal ball on pedestal, ward light swirling, cinematic, no text
description:
The crystal ball sits on a pedestal like a calm moon.

When you touch it, you feel the city above—like a heartbeat through stone.

This will change the war.

choices.label: Take the Crystal Ball of Lumen.

title: Escape Run: Upward to War
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, running through underways with crystal glow in pack, shadows chasing, cinematic, no text
description:
The underways feel narrower on the way back.

As if the fortress resents you.

Above, the city will need this sight before the next assault.

choices.label: Return to the Mage Tower with the crystal ball.

title: Tarpaulin Row
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, dockside tarpaulins over crates, rain, lantern reflections, suspicious figures, cinematic, no text
description:
Tarps flap over stacked crates. A gull shrieks, and somewhere a chain rattles — too quick to be the tide.

This is where supplies vanish before they ever reach the walls.

investigate.text: You spot a crate brand that doesn’t match any city ledger mark.

choices.label: Search the crates using a Council Warrant.

title: Quay Steps
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, stone quay steps descending to dark water, lantern on hook, hidden nook, cinematic, no text
description:
Stone steps descend to black water. Here the dock noise thins — perfect for whispers.

You hear it: ‘…move it through the grate. Tonight.’

choices.label: Set an ambush and confront them.
Follow at a distance toward the drain grate.

title: Dockside Standoff
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, tense dock standoff, hooded smugglers, one raising a bow, rain and lanterns, cinematic, no text
description:
Hooded figures freeze. One’s hand goes to a bow. Another shifts a crate as if it weighs nothing.

They’re ready to run — or kill.

choices.label: Retreat west to the Docks Ward and ready my bow.

title: Contraband Cache
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, hidden dock warehouse cache, cracked crate revealing rune-metal shards, lantern glow, cinematic, no text
description:
Inside the crate: rune-metal shards wrapped in oiled cloth. Not food. Not arrows.

Ward shards — the kind used to reinforce gate wards.

Someone is stealing the city’s protection.

choices.label: Secure the ward shards and mark the cache.
Follow the trail to the drain grate (they moved more than this).

title: Postern Gate: Return from Fog
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, small postern gate at night, scouts returning through fog, lanterns, cinematic, no text
description:
The gate opens a finger-width.

Friendly lantern code flashes once.

If you brought prisoners and the codebook, the city breathes easier.

title: Council Return Debrief
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, council chamber with codebook on table, exhausted officials leaning in, cinematic, no text
description:
The stolen codebook thuds onto the council table.

Vayne’s mouth tightens in approval.

"Good. Now we can make them mishear themselves."

choices.label: Deliver the codebook and prisoner intel.

title: Mage Tower: The Next Edge
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, mage tower study with star charts, crystal lenses, war maps, cinematic, no text
description:
Archivist Salenne spreads a thin map of underways.

"There is a crystal ball taken from the city long ago," she says.

"With it, we can see enemy movements before they become screams."

talk.text: Salenne speaks quickly—like time is a leaking cup.

choices.label: A horn sounds—another push at ‘false dawn’. Go to the signal tower.

title: Signal Tower: Dawn That Isn’t Dawn
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, city signal tower with lantern shutters and horns, pre-dawn mist, cinematic, no text
description:
The sky is dark—but the enemy horns say ‘dawn push’.

This is a trick.

Or an opportunity.

If you can lie in their signal language, you can turn their coordination into confusion.

choices.label: Counter-signal using the stolen codebook (mind check).
Ignore signals; go to the battlements to fight it straight.

title: Battlements: The False Dawn Push
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, battlements under gray pre-dawn sky, sappers and riders below, horns blaring, cinematic, no text
description:
Sappers move low under shields.

A goblin signalman blasts a horn pattern.

A warg rider circles like a knife finding a seam.

choices.label: If counter-signal succeeded, their timing is off—press the advantage.

title: Clash: Sappers and Signals
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, melee at battlements edge, sapper reaching for charge, signalman horn raised, cinematic, no text
description:
Stop the sapper or the wall cracks.

Stop the signalman or the push stays coordinated.

Choose your target first—and live with it.

choices.label: Shoot the sapper, then hold position.

title: Inner Yard: Dawn Smoke
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, inner yard with runners and smoke, dawn light barely starting, cinematic, no text
description:
Runners shout conflicting reports.

If the enemy still has a drains route, knives may already be inside the city.

You can’t be everywhere—so your choices matter.

choices.label: If drains threat persists, respond to knifers inside the walls.
Ignore reports and stay focused on the battlements.

title: Drains Knifers: Inside the Walls
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, narrow sewer tunnel, lantern reflections, knife glint in darkness, cinematic, no text
description:
A knife flashes.

A whisper in the wet.

They aren’t here to win a fight—they’re here to start fires and fear.

title: False Dawn Broken
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, dawn light finally arriving, broken sapper tools, defenders leaning on walls, cinematic, no text
description:
The push falters.

The horn pattern stutters.

For once, dawn arrives after the fighting—not during it.

choices.label: Install barricade spikes in key streets (improves next city defense).
Salenne’s map calls: descend to retrieve the crystal ball.

title: Pre-Battle Council: The City Holds Its Breath
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, war council before dawn, city map, exhausted faces, cinematic, no text
description:
You return from the engine yard with mud on your boots and war in your hands.

Vayne spreads the map.

"This is it," she says.

"Choose your lane."

talk.text: Final orders are spoken like prayers.

choices.label: Go to the battlements for lane assignment.

title: Lane Assignment: Wall, Gate, or Streets
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, battlement staging area, arrows stacked, smoke, serjeant pointing, cinematic, no text
description:
Mara shouts over the roar.

The enemy surges like a tide.

Pick where you fight, and accept what you can’t save.

talk.text: Mara’s eyes don’t blink.

title: Final Battle: Wall Line
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, wall line with smoke and ladders, distant siege tower silhouette, cinematic, no text
description:
The wall shakes with impact.

A troll wallbreaker heaves stone.

If the tower wheels were sabotaged, the tower arrives late—or breaks.

If pitch pits were ruined, fewer burning pours reach the parapet.

choices.label: Assess the wall assault (automatic outcomes from sabotage flags).

title: Wall Clash: Break the Breaker
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, troll wallbreaker and laddermen at wall, defenders striking, cinematic, no text
description:
You can target the troll (stop breaches) or the laddermen (stop boarding).

If enemy morale is shaken, they hesitate when the troll falls.

Choose.

title: Wall Wave: The Tide
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, massive wall melee, ladders, shields, rain, cinematic, no text
description:
The wave hits.

If the banner is missing, some enemy fighters glance behind them—looking for courage that isn’t there.

Now is where legends happen.

title: Final Battle: Gatehouse
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, gatehouse under ram assault, chains, splinters, berserkers, cinematic, no text
description:
The gate trembles.

If the ram chain was stolen, the ram hits wrong—less force, more rage.

If not, the gate must survive on courage and wood.

choices.label: Assess the gate assault (automatic outcome from ram sabotage).

title: Gate Clash: Berserker and Sapper
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, berserker at gate, sapper crouched, sparks, cinematic, no text
description:
A berserker roars.

A sapper reaches for a charge.

If the gate falls, the battle becomes street-by-street.

Pick a target.

title: Gate Wave
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, gate melee with smoke and splinters, cinematic, no text
description:
The wave surges.

If morale is shaken, some enemies hesitate at the threshold.

If your signals are trusted, allied squads arrive faster.

Hold the line.

title: Final Battle: Streets (Chase-Down Response)
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, dark streets with lanterns, citizens running, shadowy infiltrators, cinematic, no text
description:
Even if the wall holds, the city can burn.

Infiltrators slip through gaps.

Arson starts small.

If too many get away, the council will later say: ‘We won the battle and lost the city.’

choices.label: Chase a goblin arson team into the alleys.
Control panic at the market square first (mind check).

title: Alley Chase: Lanterns and Teeth
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, narrow alley chase, goblin with tinder pouch, lantern light, cinematic, no text
description:
Footsteps slap wet stone.

A goblin darts ahead with a tinder pouch.

You can shoot, set a trap, or sprint to tackle.

title: Streets: Fires Contained (or Not)
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, bucket line fighting fires, guards dragging captives, cinematic, no text
description:
Buckets pass hand to hand.

If too many infiltrators slipped by, smoke rises across multiple districts.

Reports come in:

- "Arson incidents!"
- "Civilian casualties!"

How bad it gets depends on what you stopped earlier.

title: Final Consolidation: Victory’s Price
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, exhausted defenders at dawn, banner torn, wounded tended, city skyline smoking, cinematic, no text
description:
Dawn arrives.

Not gentle.

But real.

The enemy’s final push breaks or stalls depending on what you sabotaged and what you chose to defend.

Now the war shifts from survival to pursuit: the enemy retreats to deeper holds… and something older stirs beneath them.

choices.label: Proceed to the city epilogue (rewards, politics, promotions).
Begin the pursuit arc: hunt the enemy to their deeper fortress and end this war.

title: Departure: Snow Road to the Fortress-Heart
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, snowy road with torches, fortress lights in distance, cinematic, no text
description:
Dawn is ash-grey.

Snow falls like quiet judgment.

The fortress-heart burns with firelight ahead.

If the Warlord completes the rally and ritual, the next siege will be worse.

Kess checks your gear without a word.

talk.text: Last brief before the end.

title: Outer Chokepoint: The Last Skirmish
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, narrow gate chokepoint, shields, firebrands with pitch, cinematic, no text
description:
A chokepoint held by survivors.

Pitch bombs arc like angry stars.

If you earned allies, you can call them.

If you carry the war-map tablet, you can bypass a flank.

Otherwise: break the line.

choices.label: Use Signal Flare Scroll to call allies (if available).
Bypass via known flank route (requires War-Map Tablet).

title: Inner Ramp: Shoot and Retreat
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, steep inner ramp, enemy closing, archer vantage points, cinematic, no text
description:
The ramp is steep and exposed.

Enemies surge from above.

This is where ranged veterans shine:

- fire from distance,
- retreat to widen space,
- set spikes,
- force the enemy to climb into bad footing.

choices.label: Shoot and fall back one area (requires bow + arrows).
Set spikes, then ready bow (if you have spikes).
Push up the ramp by force.

title: Ritual Gate: The Fortress-Heart Beats
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, ritual gate with runes, chanting echoes, red glow, cinematic, no text
description:
The gate hums.

A ritual is underway.

If you destroyed the oracle, the ritual is blind and sloppy.

If the enemy still has war-sight, they anticipate your approach.

If the city has war-sight, you can interrupt at the perfect moment.

choices.label: Interrupt the ritual at the key moment (if city_warsight_gained).
Rush the gate before it completes (luck check).
Sabotage the runes with ward nails (mind check).

title: Warlord Chamber: The Final Duel
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, warlord on dais, broken banners, firelight, trophy weapons, cinematic, no text
description:
The Warlord stands before a broken banner.

Not because he lacks a banner.

Because he wants you to believe he needs none.

He raises his weapon.

The fortress-heart beats once.

Then again.

And the fight begins.

title: Aftermath: The Helm in Your Hands
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, hero holding warlord helm trophy, dawn light through cracked stone, cinematic, no text
description:
The Warlord falls.

The host breaks.

You stand in the quiet after violence.

The war does not end in one room…

But it can tilt hard enough that the next battle becomes survivable.

You take the Warlord’s helm.

Proof.

Weight.

Ending.

title: Ending Resolve: What the City Remembers
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, city skyline at sunrise, banners repaired, smoke fading, cinematic, no text
description:
Your choices decide what the city becomes next:

- a brave city,
- a clever city,
- a cruel city,
- or a broken city pretending.

(Use endings_matrix.json to compute your outcome.)

title: Battlements: Wallwalk
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, rain-slick battlements, archers, ladders below, siege fires beyond, cinematic, no text
description:
Rain slicks the stones.

Below, ladders shift into place like the legs of insects.

Captain Harl’s voice cuts through the wind: "Hold. The. Wall."

talk.text: Harl points to the parapet edge.

choices.label: The first ladders bite the stone…

title: Wall Defense: Ladder Clash
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, melee on battlements, ladder tops, goblins scrambling, orc brute climbing, cinematic, no text
description:
Steel on stone. Breath on rain.

You can thin them at range, cut ladders, or let them climb and fight them on the wall.

But if you focus only here, some smaller shapes may slip below into the city.

choices.label: 1. Fire from the parapet, then hold position.
2. Cut a ladder rope (reduces future wave strength).
4. Break from the wall and chase infiltrators below (risk the battlements).

title: Between Waves
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, brief lull on battlements, bodies cleared, distant horns, cinematic, no text
description:
A lull—only a lull.

The next horn will come.

A runner shouts from below: "Small ones slipped through!"

choices.label: Hold the wall for Wave II.
Go after the infiltrators now (street chase).

title: Wall Defense: Brute Push
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, orc brutes cresting ladders, shields up, goblins behind, cinematic, no text
description:
Wave II hits harder.

Brutes crest the ladder tops with shields raised.

You can keep them off—if you don’t split your attention too far.

choices.label: Hold the wall—accept that some goblins slip below.

title: The Sergeant Push
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, orc sergeant with banner roaring, final push at the ladders, cinematic, no text
description:
A heavier horn.

A banner rises—orc sergeant at its heart.

If that banner reaches the wall, the line breaks.

title: Final Wave: Banner on the Stones
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, elite orc sergeant fighting on battlements, banner whipping in rain, cinematic, no text
description:
This one matters.

If you win, the wall holds.

If you lose, the fight moves into streets and fire.

title: Wall Held (For Now)
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, dawn light over battered battlements, exhausted defenders, smoke in distance, cinematic, no text
description:
The horn fades.

The wall still stands.

But the city is not safe yet.

If infiltrators slipped through, the damage will already be starting.

choices.label: Descend into the city to deal with infiltrators.

title: Inner Gate Yard
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, inner gate yard with panicked runners, lanterns, smoke plume, cinematic, no text
description:
Runners collide in the yard.

A guard points into the streets: "They’re in the alleys!"

Another shouts: "Smoke by the granary!"

If too many slipped through, tonight becomes fire… and then screams.

talk.text: Serjeant Mara is rallying patrols.

choices.label: If the enemy has a second mouth, respond to the drains breach.

title: Back Alley Fork
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, narrow wet alley splitting left and right, lantern swinging, footprints, cinematic, no text
description:
Wet stones. Tight walls.

You hear a match-scratch somewhere ahead.

This is where chase work is done — fast choices, dirty corners.

choices.label: 1. Open fire with my bow, then advance carefully.
2. Set spikes at the fork to slow them.

title: Chase Distance
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, goblins sprinting between alleys, lantern streaks, arrows flying, cinematic, no text
description:
You manage distance in bursts: corner to corner.

If you lose them, the city pays.

If you press too hard, you run into a knife waiting in the dark.

choices.label: You hesitate… and they slip away into the dark.

title: Smoke by the Granary
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, granary street with smoke and small flames, goblin firebug fleeing, civilians shouting, cinematic, no text
description:
A firebug bolts past a granary door.

Smoke curls from fresh pitch.

This is the first warning. If you fail here, the next warning is bodies.

choices.label: Smother the fire quickly (bucket of sand).
Ignore the flames and pursue the firebug.

title: Infiltrators Dealt With
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, alley aftermath, dropped tinder pouch, guard lanterns arriving, cinematic, no text
description:
The chase ends in wet stone and hard breathing.

You gather proof: tinder pouches and black tokens.

Serjeant Mara arrives with lanterns. "Good. Now—how many got away?"

choices.label: Return to the Inner Gate Yard.

title: Escalating Reports
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, guard runner delivering report in rainy street, worried faces, cinematic, no text
description:
A runner arrives soaked.

If you let infiltrators slip by, the city’s pain spreads in stages.

First fire. Then blood.

choices.label: If slip count is high, arson reports escalate.
If slip count is very high, civilian casualties are reported.

title: Market Square: Panic and Smoke
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, market square at night with smoke, civilians running, guards shouting, cinematic, no text
description:
The market is chaos.

If fires started, merchants scream about burning stalls.

If casualties began, guards carry bodies under cloaks.

"Seek out the infiltrators with due haste!"

choices.label: Hunt another infiltrator pack through the alleys (harder).
If you’ve stopped enough packs, declare the streets secured.

title: Tenements Lane
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, cramped tenement street, shuttered windows, blood on cobbles, lantern light, cinematic, no text
description:
Shutters slam.

A child cries somewhere above.

A goblin laughs—then stops when it hears your boots.

title: Street Secured
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, guards arriving, lanterns, captured goblin token, weary civilians, cinematic, no text
description:
Guards arrive in numbers.

The immediate threat is gone.

The consequences remain—but you kept them from becoming worse.

choices.label: Return to report in the Inner Gate Yard.

title: Drains Junction: Wet Stone and Whispering
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, sewer junction with rushing water, lantern reflections, shadowy figures, cinematic, no text
description:
If the enemy kept a ‘second mouth,’ this is where it bites.

You hear splashing that isn’t water.

Something is moving upstream.

choices.label: Seal the breach (fight in the drains).

title: Inner Gate Yard
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, inner gate yard with barricade materials, soldiers, carts, tense preparation, cinematic, no text
description:
Carts creak. Ropes tighten. Soldiers hammer planks into place. The gate is a throat — and the city is swallowing fear.

A captain shouts: "Timber here! Grain there! Arrows to the parapet!"

talk.text: A captain eyes your gear. "If you’ve got council backing, you’re not just a runner — you’re a fix."

choices.label: Offer help to finalize defenses (pre-battle readiness).

title: Barricade Line
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, barricade line being built, stacked timber, nails, engineers, torchlight, cinematic, no text
description:
Timber stacks become walls in fast hands. Nail buckets clatter. Engineers argue angles like it’s religion.

This line will decide how much blood reaches the gate.

choices.label: Deliver 1 timber bundle to the barricade teams.

investigate.text: A foreman points at empty nail buckets. "We’re building walls with wishes at this rate."

choices.label: Offer to run nail duty at the blacksmith.

title: Granary Checkpoint
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, granary checkpoint with grain sacks, armed clerks, ration ledgers, cinematic, no text
description:
Clerks with spears guard sacks like jewels. Hunger makes thieves of honest folk.

The city’s stomach must be full before its fist can swing.

talk.text: "If you’ve brought grain, stack it. If you’ve brought trouble, sign the ledger first."

choices.label: Deliver 1 sack of grain to the stores.

title: Ward Installation Plinth
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, rune plinth near the gate, ward-stone socket, mage-priest, glowing sigils, cinematic, no text
description:
A rune plinth stands near the gate, its socket empty. A mage-priest wipes rain from a glyph and exhales.

"Without a ward-stone," they say, "the gate is just a door."

choices.label: Install a ward-stone into the plinth.
Cast Wardseal to strengthen the plinth temporarily.

title: Parapet Post
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, parapet post overlooking fields, archers, arrow barrels, stormy horizon, cinematic, no text
description:
You look out over wet fields toward the tree line. Somewhere out there, the enemy counts the same distance.

A sergeant points to empty arrow barrels. "If we run dry, we die."

take.text: You can deliver arrows here to stock the parapet.

choices.label: Deliver 1 bundle of arrows to the parapet barrels.
Report readiness to the captain (if key tasks are done).

title: Gate Approach Road
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, road facing the city gate from outside, muddy ruts, distant barricades, storm clouds, cinematic, no text
description:
The road outside the walls is a wound in the earth. From here, you can see the gate’s outline — and imagine it broken.

Movement flickers at the far field line.

choices.label: Advance cautiously toward the field line.

title: Field Line: Goblin Probe
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, field line with goblin silhouettes and bows, tension, rain, cinematic, no text
description:
A goblin probe spreads out like stains in the grass. One raises a horn — another nocks an arrow.

If this is only a probe, the real wave is close behind.

choices.label: Set my spikes in front of me.
Retreat north toward the gate and ready bow.
Retreat west into the ditch for cover.

title: Battlements: The Biggest Push
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, massive siege lines, siege tower rolling, ram at gate, arrows, smoke, cinematic, no text
description:
It begins.

Siege tower wheels forward.

A ram pounds the gate.

Somewhere below, water churns under streets.

You can’t stop everything. Choose.

talk.text: Serjeant Mara grips your shoulder.

choices.label: If you have shutters, prep a counter-signal (one free advantage).

title: Choice: Where You Stand Matters
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, war map on battlement table with three marked fronts, hands pointing, cinematic, no text
description:
The city is a body.

The wall is its ribs.

The gate is its throat.

The drains are its veins.

Choose where you fight first.

choices.label: 1) Main Wall: stop the siege tower and ladders.
3) Drains: stop an inner surge (only if the mouth still lives).

title: Main Wall: Tower and Ladders
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, siege tower nearing wall, ladders rising, defenders shouting, cinematic, no text
description:
Ladders bite the stone.

The siege tower rolls like an oncoming house.

If the enemy lacks their standard, their courage wavers—if you push them hard enough.

title: Wall Clash
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, close combat on wall, ladders, arrows, rain, cinematic, no text
description:
A ladderman climbs.

A vanguard shoves.

Win here and the tower stalls.

Lose here and the city bleeds.

title: Wall Resolution: Morale Break
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, enemies faltering, ladder slipping, defenders pushing back, cinematic, no text
description:
Without their banner, some hesitate.

Hesitation is how armies die.

If you press, they may break.

choices.label: Leave the wall and run to another front.

title: Gatehouse: The Ram
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, gatehouse shaking under ram hits, splinters flying, defenders bracing, cinematic, no text
description:
The ram strikes like a drum calling death.

If you installed barricades, the approach is tighter.

If you brought a chain hook, you might pull the ram off-line.

choices.label: Use gate chain hook to drag the ram sideways (luck check).

title: Gate Clash
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, melee at gate, orc ram crew roaring, sparks and smoke, cinematic, no text
description:
The ram crew fights like they’ve been promised glory.

Without the banner, that promise rings hollow.

Make it ring.

title: Gate Resolution: The Door Holds
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, gate still standing, broken ram pieces, exhausted defenders, cinematic, no text
description:
If the gate holds, the city keeps its spine.

If it fails, the streets become a slaughterhouse.

The assault still rages elsewhere—run if you must.

title: Drains Entry: The Inner Surge
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, sewer entry with churning water and shadows, lantern reflection, cinematic, no text
description:
Water churns like something breathing.

If the ‘second mouth’ still lives, it can vomit enemies into the city.

Stop them now—or stop the mouth forever later.

choices.label: Use holy pitch to choke the crawlspace (luck check).
Commit to the permanent fix: hunt the second mouth after the assault.

title: Great Assault: Consolidation
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, defenders regrouping, wounded treated, smoke thinning, dawn light, cinematic, no text
description:
Hours later, the city still stands.

Not whole. Not safe.

But standing.

Now you decide what ends this war faster:

- Keep striking the enemy’s command.
- Or seal the drains route forever.

choices.label: If drains threat persists, pursue the permanent fix beneath the city.
Prepare the next counterstrike (future arc): break their siege engines for good.

title: Ridge Overlook: Fortress in the Cloudline
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, mountain ridge overlook, fortress silhouette in cloudline, winding pass below, cinematic, no text
description:
The fortress sits like a clenched fist in the mountains.

The retreat trail leads into it.

If you let them rest here, the war resets.

Kess points at the pass like it insulted him personally.

talk.text: Kess lays out routes and risks.

choices.label: 1) Take the Narrow Pass (archers, chase options).

title: Narrow Pass: Arrows and Wind
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, narrow cliff pass, goblin archers above, wind whipping cloak, cinematic, no text
description:
The path is one body wide.

Above, goblin archers test range.

This is where veterans use distance like a weapon:
shoot, retreat, reposition — and make the enemy chase on bad footing.

choices.label: Shoot, then retreat one area as they close (ranged tactic).
Hold position and fight the harriers.
Use climbing spikes to bypass the worst of the pass (luck check).

title: Pass Skirmish: Make Them Misstep
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, cliff skirmish, arrows, slipping stones, cinematic, no text
description:
A reaver rushes.

Archers keep distance.

One shove near the edge ends fights quickly.

But risks ending you too.

title: Goat Path: Stone Teeth and Thin Air
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, steep goat path with climbing spikes, fog, distant fortress, cinematic, no text
description:
The goat path is a slow argument with gravity.

One slip becomes a lesson.

Two slips becomes a memorial.

title: Fortress Outworks: Smoke Vents and Barrels
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, fortress outer works, smoke vents, barrels, guard lanterns, cinematic, no text
description:
The outworks smell like tar, stew, and wet iron.

You spot:

- A service door used by porters.
- A smoke vent big enough for a desperate crawl.
- A watchpath where patrols march like metronomes.

choices.label: Crawl through the smoke vent (luck check).

title: Patrol Clash: Take Their Access
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, fortress patrol fight under lanterns, snow flurries, cinematic, no text
description:
A sergeant barks orders.

A reaver watches your hands.

Win cleanly and you take keys.

Lose loudly and the whole fortress wakes up.

title: Kitchens: Stew and Secrets
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, fortress kitchens with cauldrons and hooks, porter in shadows, cinematic, no text
description:
Even monsters need soup.

A porter freezes when he sees you.

His belt carries keys.

His eyes carry fear.

talk.text: The porter can become a door instead of a problem.

title: Service Corridor: The Fortress’s Veins
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, narrow corridor with pipes and doors, damp stone, cinematic, no text
description:
The fortress has two hearts:

- the upper halls where orders are shouted,
- and the lower stone where old things listen.

A cistern hatch is marked with older runes.

You hear distant water… like a waterfall that shouldn’t be inside a mountain.

choices.label: Open the cistern hatch (requires keyring or hard check).
Go upward toward the command hall (later).

title: Outside the Walls
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, city gate behind, muddy road ahead, distant farms and tree line, cinematic, no text
description:
The gate closes behind you with a sound like finality.

Ahead: farms, timber lines, and the uneasy quiet of a land pretending it isn’t at war.

A militia runner hands you a slate: FOOD and WOOD. "Bring both. Fast."

choices.label: Head to the farms for food.
Head to the woodline for timber.

title: Farm Lane
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, farm lane with hedges, distant barn, scarecrow, overcast, cinematic, no text
description:
Hedges line the lane. A barn sits like a tired animal.

A farmer waves frantically from behind a cart. "They’ve been skimming our stores at night."

take.text: You can load grain sacks onto a cart.

talk.text: The farmer points north.

title: Barnyard
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, barnyard with stacked sacks, chickens scattering, muddy footprints, cinematic, no text
description:
Sacks are stacked under tarp.

Small muddy footprints lead away toward the hedge line.

You hear distant yips — too organized for foxes.

title: Woodline Edge
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, forest edge with tall trunks, fog, axe stump, cinematic, no text
description:
Tall trunks and damp fog.

Fresh stumps show someone already worked here—recently.

A crow calls once. Then stops.

take.text: You can cut and bundle timber.

choices.label: You hear yips in the trees… ready yourself.

title: Goblin Raid Approaching
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, goblin raiding party emerging from hedge/trees, spears and bows, cinematic, no text
description:
A goblin raiding party approaches.

They’re not charging blindly — they’re spreading, trying to surround.

You can manage distance if you act fast.

choices.label: 2. Set my spikes in front of me.
4. Stand and fight when they close.

title: Choose Retreat Direction
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, adventurer backing away through muddy field, goblins closing, cinematic, no text
description:
Retreat buys distance — but not forever.

Choose a direction and keep your weapon ready.

title: Skirmish Distance
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, arrows flying across open ground, goblins weaving, cinematic, no text
description:
You can keep them at range for a moment longer.

If you keep backing up and firing, you might break their nerve — or run out of space.

choices.label: Fire again, then retreat one square.

title: After the Raid
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, goblin bodies and discarded gear in mud, quiet after fight, cinematic, no text
description:
The field goes quiet.

If you survived, you’ve earned something more valuable than timber: confidence.

Now you must carry the supplies back before another party finds you.

choices.label: Return to the city with supplies.

title: Forest Track
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, narrow forest track, fog, broken cart wheel, ominous, cinematic, no text
description:
A broken cart wheel lies half-buried.

The track has been used recently — too recently.

Somewhere ahead, you hear metal tapping stone: a signal, not an accident.

choices.label: Follow the signal toward the raiders’ field camp (next stage).

title: Forward Camp Edge
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, hidden view of goblin camp through trees, smoke from cookfires, crude palisade, cinematic, no text
description:
Through the trees you see it: a forward camp.

Low palisade. Cookfires. Crates.

Not a fortress—just a mouth feeding the siege.

choices.label: Rush in before patrol loops back.

title: Camp Inner Lane
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, muddy lane between crude tents, goblin scouts, lanterns, cinematic, no text
description:
Tents sag in the rain. Goblins trot with bundles.

A patrol whistles a crude rhythm.

You can still turn this into a quiet victory—or a loud one.

choices.label: A patrol turns in—avoid or fight.

title: Patrol Contact: Whistles and Teeth
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, goblin patrol with lantern catching an intruder, tense moment, cinematic, no text
description:
A goblin scout’s lantern swings your way.

It inhales—about to whistle.

You have one clean moment.

choices.label: Shoot the scout before it whistles.
Throw a smoke jar and slip away.

title: Supply Tents
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, supply tents with crates, sacks of grain, stacked arrows, torchlight, cinematic, no text
description:
Crates. Grain sacks. Spare spearheads.

This camp’s purpose is simple: keep the siege alive.

Burning this would save lives. But it would also light you up like a beacon.

investigate.text: A crate is marked with charcoal: ‘TUNNEL—TOOLS’ and ‘TRANSFER—HOLD.’

choices.label: Take a strip of siege orders.

title: Mess Kettle
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, camp cookfire with huge kettle, goblin cook stirring, greasy smoke, cinematic, no text
description:
A goblin cook stirs a kettle that could feed fifty.

If you poison this, the siege line weakens tomorrow.

But you must be quick and quiet.

title: Cage Pens
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, crude cages with frightened farmers, orc taskmaster, rain and mud, cinematic, no text
description:
Cages. People.

An orc taskmaster paces with a cudgel.

A farmer meets your eyes—defiant, not broken.

talk.text: The captive whispers through the bars.

choices.label: Free the captives (if you have a shackle key).
Fight the taskmaster and his detail.

title: Taskmaster Fight
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, orc taskmaster raising cudgel, goblins swarming, muddy camp, cinematic, no text
description:
The taskmaster bellows and charges.

If you drop him, you’ll have time to free the cages.

If you don’t, you’ll be the next lesson.

title: Keys in the Mud
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, fallen orc, keys in mud, cages behind, cinematic, no text
description:
The taskmaster falls.

A key glints in the mud.

The cages rattle—not with begging, but with readiness.

title: Escape Lane: Back Roads
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, hedgerow lane with fleeing captives, distant camp fires, cinematic, no text
description:
The freed farmers slip into hedgerows like ghosts.

Rill whispers: "There’s an overlook on the ridge. You’ll see the siege lines from there."

"And the sinkholes—those are real. The map you took… it’s a death road."

choices.label: Escort them toward the city road.

title: Signal Post
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, crude signal post with horns and flags, goblin scout watching horizon, cinematic, no text
description:
A crude post with horns and flags.

One good signal could call half the camp.

One broken signal buys you minutes.

title: Alarm Rising
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, camp in chaos, torches flaring, goblins shouting, smoke, cinematic, no text
description:
Somewhere a whistle shrieks.

Torches flare.

The camp wakes like a kicked hive.

You must choose: slip away now—or risk a last look at the siege line itself.

title: Ridge Overlook
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, high ridge overlooking siege lines, campfires like stars, city walls distant, cinematic, no text
description:
From the ridge you see it: the siege line.

Ladders stacked like teeth. Fires in long rows. Shapes moving with purpose.

Your city is a dark shape beyond—still standing.

For now.

choices.label: Complete recon of the siege lines (and count ladders).

title: A Small Role in a Big War
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, skirmish breaking out near siege stores, sentries turning, cinematic, no text
description:
A small supply knot sits apart from the main line—guarded lightly.

If you strike it, you’ll thin tomorrow’s push.

But you might not walk away.

choices.label: Strike the siege skirmish line and flee.
Withdraw and return to the city with what you learned.

title: Skirmish at Distance
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, arrows exchanged near siege stores, smoke rising, cinematic, no text
description:
You can fight and retreat—buying distance square by square.

If you break them quickly, you escape.

If you linger, the full line notices.

title: Escape Choice
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, adventurer sprinting through grass, city walls far away, pursuit behind, cinematic, no text
description:
Distance is your friend.

Choose a direction and don’t stop moving.

title: Quiet After Fire
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, burned supply knot, fallen spears, smoke drifting, cinematic, no text
description:
You leave them in the grass.

Smoke rises from a small supply knot.

It isn’t a victory the bards will sing—but it’s one the city will feel.

choices.label: Return to the city with your report.

title: After the Iron Falls
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, exhausted defenders in gate yard, rain easing, broken shields, cinematic, no text
description:
The yard is mud, blood, and splintered courage.

The enemy recoils — not defeated, only delayed.

A messenger finds you: "Councilor Vayne wants you. Now."

choices.label: Go to the council hall for a covert assignment.
If you have 3 key fragments, bind them into a Gatewarden’s Seal.

title: Covert Assignment
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, councilor leaning over map with candles, urgent whispers, cinematic, no text
description:
Vayne speaks without ceremony.

"They tested the gate — and they tested our inside.

There is another way in: old sewers that lead into limestone caves. From there, a forgotten under-fortress sits like a thorn.

If they hold it, they can pour into the city behind the gate. We need a knife in the dark."

choices.label: Accept the mission: descend into the sewers and find the under-fortress approach.
If the gate breached, offer to lead citizens to a safe route first.

title: Inner Streets: Choke Point
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, narrow medieval street barricade, citizens fleeing, defenders forming line, cinematic, no text
description:
A narrow street becomes a funnel. Barrels roll. Planks slam down.

If the gate spill widens, this is where the city dies — or holds.

choices.label: Hold for a short time to let civilians move.
Slip into the sewer access route (covert).

title: Old Sewer Access
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, hidden sewer hatch with lantern, rainwater running into darkness, cinematic, no text
description:
A hatch hidden behind a collapsed brick screen.

Warm air breathes up from below — carrying rot, old water, and something like wet fur.

This route predates the city’s current walls. That’s why it’s dangerous. That’s why it matters.

title: Sewer Run: Whispering Water
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, sewer tunnel with fast shallow water, echoes, lantern glow, cinematic, no text
description:
Water whispers along the floor, carrying every sound.

You see chalk marks: old smugglers. New gouges: something clawed.

choices.label: Cast Keen Eye to read the marks and find the safer route.

title: Split: Brickwork and Stone
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, sewer split with one brick tunnel and one rough stone tunnel, cinematic, no text
description:
Two paths.

Left: newer brick, tighter, with iron brackets.
Right: older stone, rough and damp, opening downward.

The older route smells like caves.

choices.label: Take the brick route (risk of patrols).
Take the old stone route (risk of beasts).

title: Brick Route: Patrol Shadows
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, brick sewer with lantern light ahead, shadowy figures, tense stealth, cinematic, no text
description:
Lantern light ahead.

Voices — not guards. Too harsh. Too amused.

Smugglers… or something worse wearing their confidence.

choices.label: Use Muffle Steps and slip past.

title: Stone Drop
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, rough stone tunnel descending, water dripping, claw marks, cinematic, no text
description:
The stone route slopes down.

Claw marks rake the wall. Something uses this as a corridor — not a home.

Homes are safer than corridors.

title: Cave Mouth: Limestone Breath
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, limestone cave mouth beyond sewer arch, mist, faint crystals, cinematic, no text
description:
The sewer ends in a limestone throat.

Mist curls from fissures. In the distance, faint crystals catch your lantern like eyes.

Somewhere deeper, stone echoes with bootsteps — disciplined, not animal.

The under-fortress is real.

choices.label: Enter the caves toward the under-fortress.

title: Cave Junction: The Forked Dark
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, cave junction with two tunnels, one with faint torch soot, one with crystal glimmer, cinematic, no text
description:
Two tunnels.

Left: soot on stone — torches. People.
Right: crystal glimmer — natural… or bait.

If you want the fortress, you follow people. If you want answers, you follow the earth.

choices.label: Follow the soot trail (toward the under-fortress).
Follow the crystal glimmer (side loot / ward shards).

title: Crystal Grotto
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, crystal grotto with glowing shards, shallow pool, eerie beauty, cinematic, no text
description:
Crystals stud the walls like frozen lightning.

In the pool, something metallic gleams — rune-metal, broken into familiar shapes.

Ward shards. Enough to make another stone… or strengthen a seal.

title: Camp in the Woods
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, rough militia camp in woodland shadows, bedrolls, cookfire, rabbit snares, dawn mist, cinematic, no text
description: As the smell of rabbit stew fills your nostrils for another day you sit and ponder your choices in life. Perhaps you can barter your way into the city to find a real pie and a dry bed to sleep in.

title: Forest Path
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, narrow forest path through damp pines, wheel ruts, city walls in the distance, cinematic, no text
description:
A muddy path threads through the trees toward the city. Cart ruts, hoof prints, and boot marks all point the same way: everyone still above ground knows something ugly is gathering below.

South leads back to camp. North rises toward the city gates.

title: City Gates
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, city gatehouse at dawn, weary guards, market banners, muddy road, cinematic, no text
description:
The gate sergeant eyes you, then your kit. Refugees, mercenaries, and traders have choked the entries all week, so he wants proof you are worth the trouble. Fresh game will do.

Bring him three rabbits and he lets you inside. Once admitted, north leads into Prison Square.

choices.label: Hand over three rabbits for entry.

effects.text: The sergeant grunts, pockets the rabbits for the cookhouse, and waves you through.

title: Prison Square
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, prison yard square inside city walls, guards at a barred wagon, rain-dark stone, market lane right, brewery lane left, cinematic, no text
description: Just inside the walls, Prison Square opens around a wagon yard and a squat lockup where guards process drunks, thieves, and anything uglier hauled in from the roads. Market Street runs off to the right. Brewery Lane angles left beneath leaning signs and chimney smoke. South returns to the City Gates.

effects.text: One of the guards sizes you up and jerks a thumb toward the keep. 'If you're new in town, make yourself useful and join the militia. Plenty of work below. And if you catch any enemy combatants alive, bring them here. The prison pays a fair bounty for breathing prisoners.'

title: Market Street
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, cramped market street with hardware stall, tool racks, lanterns, anxious townsfolk, cinematic, no text
description:
Market Street smells of lamp oil, wet wood, and nerves. The busiest storefront on the lane is a hardware store with crates of rope, chalk, wraps, and travel gear stacked right up to the threshold, while a food stall nearby keeps hot broth, skewers, and day-old bread moving to anyone heading below.

North leads to Undercity Entrance. West returns to Prison Square.

choices.label: Buy a bowl of hot broth (1 gold).

effects.text: The vendor ladles hot broth into a clay bowl and hands it over.

choices.label: Buy a meat skewer wrapped in flatbread (2 gold).

effects.text: You tuck the warm skewer into your pack for later.

choices.label: Buy bread, cheese, and dried fruit (3 gold).

effects.text: You wrap the food in cloth and stow it. Good for the road.

title: Hardware Store
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, cramped fantasy hardware shop, ropes, chalk, wrapped tools, lantern light, practical gear stacked high, cinematic, no text
description: Every wall is lined with practical gear for people who expect wet tunnels, bad footing, and the need to improvise under pressure. The shopkeeper keeps the useful stock close and the breakable stock well out of reach.

title: Brewery Lane
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, crooked tavern street, warm window light, pie stall, dice table, smoke and drizzle, cinematic, no text
description:
Brewery Lane glows with warm shutters, dripping eaves, and the smell of yeast riding the rain. The sign for Pies & Dice creaks over the busiest doorway on the lane, and the smell of gravy keeps drifting down from the kitchen windows.

East returns to Prison Square.

title: Pies & Dice
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, cramped city tavern interior, pies on a hot board, candlelight, gamblers and travel-stained militia, cinematic, no text
description: The common room is all steam, wet wool, and shouted boasts. A serving board by the bar offers meat pies to go, while the loudest voices come from the dice table in the back. The innkeeper will also rent you a narrow upstairs room if you can pay in advance.

choices.label: Rent a room at the tavern (2 gold).

effects.text: The innkeeper takes your coins, slides over a brass key, and points you toward a room upstairs.

title: Dice Table
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, crowded tavern dice table, tankards, gamblers leaning in, candlelit tension, cinematic, no text
description: The back table is ringed three deep with drinkers, cutpurses, and off-duty militia. Stakes stay low enough to avoid knife work, but not low enough to avoid regret.

title: Tavern Bedroom
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, cramped tavern bedroom under rafters, narrow bed, wash basin, travel pack on chair, cinematic, no text
description: The room is cramped but dry, with a narrow bed, a wash basin, and a door sturdy enough to keep out the worst of the noise downstairs.

effects.text: You sleep hard, wake fully restored, and hear that the undercity patrol has changed over.

title: Undercity Entrance
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, narrow street above sewer steps, bookshop sign Tomb and Tome, iron grates, city stone, cinematic, no text
description:
The street narrows around iron grates, warning placards, and the leaning frontage of Tomb & Tome. Its windows are crowded with cheap primers, cracked scroll tubes, and enough warding chalk to suggest the owner knows exactly what lives below.

North climbs to Castle Rise. South returns to Market Street. Down leads into the undercity approach.

title: Tomb & Tome
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, cramped occult bookshop, leaning shelves, scroll tubes, candle smoke, suspicious proprietor, cinematic, no text
description: Every shelf leans under the weight of cheap grimoires, damp primers, and scroll cases tied with too many warning charms. The proprietor watches you over a stack of ledgers, ready to sell dangerous knowledge to anyone who pays first.

choices.label: Step back out to the Undercity Entrance.

title: Castle Rise
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, uphill castle street, smithy sparks, stone stair, guards moving through drizzle, cinematic, no text
description:
Castle Rise climbs toward the keep. The smithy is still open, hammering out the last sensible purchases before anyone brave or stupid enough goes below.

North leads to the Castle Entrance. East leads to Inn Street. South returns to the Undercity Entrance.

title: Castle Rise Smithy
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, cramped city smithy interior, forge glow, weapon racks, apron-clad smith, cinematic, no text
description: Inside the smithy, the heat hits first. Weapons hang from soot-dark rafters, shields lean against the wall, and the smith keeps the last useful gear within arm's reach for anyone heading below.

choices.label: Step back out to Castle Rise.

title: Inn Street
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, shabby inn street, crooked signboard, rain-soaked cobbles, tired patrons, cinematic, no text
description:
The inn on this lane is cheap, damp, and none too clean, but the keeper still keeps a lamp burning for anyone with coin enough to get in out of the rain.

West returns to Castle Rise.

title: The Inn
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, shabby inn common room, damp coats, tired keeper, cheap candles, rough tables, cinematic, no text
description: Inside, the inn is warmer than the street but only just. The keeper offers a bare room upstairs to anyone willing to pay before asking questions.

choices.label: Rent a room at the inn (1 gold).

effects.text: The keeper palms your coin, hands you a chipped room key, and jerks his chin toward the stairs.

title: Inn Bedroom
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, shabby inn bedroom, rumpled blanket, cracked wash bowl, water stains, candle on crate, cinematic, no text
description: The room is damp, the blanket thin, and the mattress remembers every previous guest. Still, it is privacy, a door that latches, and somewhere to collapse.

effects.text: You wake a little less dead than before. By the time you wash up, the undercity patrol has reset.

title: Castle Entrance
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, castle gate under banners, armored guard at attention, storm light, cinematic, no text
description:
A guard captain at the castle gate sizes you up and speaks plainly. If you want to make a name for yourself, the city does not need another braggart in the yard; it needs someone below. Goblins and orcs have infested the ancient sewers, set camp there, and are preparing to strike the city from within.

He says that if you are willing to sign the militia roll and take the work seriously, he can authorize a small stipend from the city coffers before sending you down. Bring back war plans, trophies, or any proof worth a bounty.

South returns to Castle Rise.

choices.label: Sign the militia roll and accept the stipend (12 gold).

effects.text: You put your name on the militia roll. The captain presses a 12-gold stipend into your hand and tells you not to waste the city's trust.

title: Under-Fortress Outer Wall
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, ancient underground fortress wall carved into rock, torchlight, skull motifs, cinematic, no text
description:
Stonework rises from rock as if it grew there.

An under-fortress — old as the first wars.

You hear orders in guttural tongues.

If this place feeds the invasion, cutting it will save the city more than any heroics at the gate.

title: Under-Fortress Entry
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, underground fortress gate with iron bars, torch sconces, guards in silhouette, cinematic, no text
description:
The sewer stairs break into an ancient threshold of iron bars, carved lintels, and old military stone. A forward patrol has made its stand here, watching the approach to the under-fortress proper.

Clear them out and the way below is yours. Up leads back to the city if you are not ready yet.

choices.label: Proceed into Under-Fortress Scenario I (next chapter).

title: Sewer Tunnel
text: The passage tightens; boots splash through knee-deep filth while iron rails and cracked masonry cut dim shapes in torchlight.
imagePrompt: A narrow, wet stone sewer tunnel lit by torches: slick walls, shallow running water, discarded tools and dripping stone.

title: Flooded Chamber
text: A low chamber yawns, half-drowned in oily water. Something moves under the surface — a shadow or a machine — and the air feels wrong.
imagePrompt: A half-submerged stone chamber with oily water, scattered wreckage and a faint glint of metal beneath the surface.

choices.text: Return and report to the captain

title: Collapsed Gallery
text: Rubble chokes the passage; rune-carved lintels pulse with a faint light as the draft finds its way through the cracks.
imagePrompt: A collapsed stone gallery with rune-etched lintels, dust-filled air and timber braces half-buried in debris.

choices.text: Remove the rubble and force a way

title: Underfortress Gate
text: An inner gate bars the way — iron long corroded, its frame carved with warding sigils. Beyond, darkness promises secrets and danger.
imagePrompt: A heavy inner gate with rusted iron and glowing sigils, the small gap beyond swallowed by shadow.
