choices.text: Try the recovered key on the lock
Force the gate open with tools

title: Reliquary Approach
text: Past the gate the reliquary corridor hums, braided runes glowing beneath scuffed feet; the air thrums with a distant, patient power.
imagePrompt: A long reliquary corridor lit by dim braziers, arcane symbols glowing faintly on the stone floor and dust motes drifting in the light.

title: Outside the Gate: The Retreat Trail
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, city gate behind, muddy road ahead with retreat tracks, dawn haze, cinematic, no text
description:
The enemy retreats.

Not fleeing.

Retreating.

There’s discipline in the tracks—until there isn’t.

Kess kneels, reading mud like scripture.

talk.text: Kess offers two immediate priorities.

choices.label: Head toward the ridge farms for witnesses.

title: Ridge Farms: Smoke from Small Fires
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, farmstead with broken fence, smoke from barn corner, frightened villagers, cinematic, no text
description:
The farms look raided, not destroyed.

Like the enemy took what it needed and left fear behind.

A woman steps forward, jaw clenched.

talk.text: Marta knows what she saw.

choices.label: Follow the trail toward the rearguard.

title: Retreat Road: Rearguard Contact
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, road ambush with broken carts, orc rearguard blocking path, goblin runner ready to bolt, cinematic, no text
description:
A rearguard blocks the road.

A goblin runner watches the hills.

If the runner escapes, the enemy disappears into stone.

If the rearguard holds, you lose time and blood.

choices.label: 1) Focus fire on the runner (ranged option).

title: Road Fight: Break the Block
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, melee on muddy road, runner darting, cinematic, no text
description:
Steel on mud.

Breath on cold air.

If morale is still shaken from the stolen standard, their discipline frays faster.

title: Hills Flank: Wargs in the Mist
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, misty hills, warg eyes glowing, sparse trees, cinematic, no text
description:
The trail bends into hills.

You hear breathing that isn’t yours.

Wargs scout the flank—testing you.

title: Crack in the Hills: The Stone Doorway
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, narrow rock crack shaped like a doorway, old carvings like teeth, lantern glow, cinematic, no text
description:
The hills split.

A doorway shaped like old teeth waits in shadow.

If the runner escaped, you hear distant horns below.

If not, the under-fortress is unaware… for now.

title: Sinkhole Ravine
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, forest ravine with yawning sinkhole, mist rising, broken roots, cinematic, no text
description:
The ground here has collapsed into a ragged throat.

Cold air breathes up from below.

The tunnel survey map’s charcoal lines match the landscape too well for comfort.

choices.label: Mark the rim with chalk for your return.

title: Chalk Caverns: White Mouth
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, chalk-white cavern walls, dripping water, footprints, torch glow, cinematic, no text
description:
The cave walls are chalk-white and damp.

Footprints crisscross the powder like scribbles.

Some prints are barefoot—prisoners.

investigate.text: Fresh drag marks lead north, toward torchlight flicker.

choices.label: Cast Keen Eye to identify patrol loops.

title: Chalk Caverns Fork
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, forked chalk cave passage, one side with smoke, one with silence, cinematic, no text
description:
Two passages split.

Left: smoke and the smell of cookfires.
Right: silence, but with scuffed chalk where someone tried to hide their trail.

title: A Whisper in the Chalk
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, small goblin hiding behind chalk pillar, terrified eyes, cinematic, no text
description:
A small figure trembles behind a chalk pillar.

It raises both hands in surrender.

"Mip," it whispers. "I don’t want the Red Knife to win."

talk.text: Mip glances down the tunnel like it expects death to arrive on schedule.

title: Patrol Gallery
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, cavern gallery with torch patrol, chalk dust in air, cinematic, no text
description:
Torchlight sweeps over chalk dust.

A patrol moves with practiced boredom.

If they spot you, the tunnels will fill with whistles.

choices.label: Cast Muffle Steps and slip past.
A patrol turns in—avoid or fight.

title: Chalk Patrol Contact
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, goblin patrol with slingmen, lantern catching intruder, cinematic, no text
description:
A goblin slingman raises a pouch of stones.

A Red Knife goblin grins. "Lost?"

title: Red Knife Outer Works
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, crude underground fortifications, red cloth cords, iron wedges, torch smoke, cinematic, no text
description:
Palisades and wedge-stakes hold the cave like rotten teeth.

Red cords hang from belts and posts.

You hear a voice barking orders: "TRANSFER BEFORE DAWN."

investigate.text: You spot iron wedges hammered into support beams—temporary, rushed construction.

choices.label: If you have a Ward Splinter Focus, locate the weakest supports.

title: Hostage Vault
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, underground vault cell with noble hostage chained, guarded by handler, cinematic, no text
description:
A reinforced vault door.

Inside: a noblewoman chained to a ringbolt, calm in the way only desperate courage can be.

A handler watches with a ransom token in hand.

talk.text: The hostage meets your eyes without flinching.

choices.label: The handler offers a swap: ‘Leave the second mouth untouched, and she walks.’

title: Chains Loosened
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, broken chain, hostage standing, torchlight, cinematic, no text
description:
The handler falls.

The key is crude, but the chain gives.

Lady Seren exhales once—like she’s been holding her breath for days.

choices.label: Free Lady Seren and prepare to move.

title: The Swap Decision
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, hostage handler holding token, shadows, tense negotiation, cinematic, no text
description:
A ransom token flips between fingers.

"Trade," the handler whispers. "No collapse. No fire. No heroics. Take her and go."

You understand the cost: if you accept, the enemy keeps a ‘second mouth’ into the city drains.

If you refuse, you can stop the infiltration—but she may die in the chaos.

choices.label: Accept the swap: rescue Seren, leave the second mouth intact.
Refuse: attempt to collapse the second mouth (high risk).
Attempt a trick: use smoke to grab Seren and run, then collapse behind you (very high risk).

title: Double Play
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, smoke filling vault, hostage pulled free, chaotic motion, cinematic, no text
description:
Smoke blooms.

For a second, everything is shapes.

You pull Seren toward the tunnels while footsteps hammer toward you.

title: Transfer Tunnels
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, narrow tunnel with carts and ropes, torchlight, guards, cinematic, no text
description:
Carts. Ropes. Drag marks.

The transfer route is active.

If you let it run, the enemy gets what it wants—hostages moved beyond reach.

choices.label: A guard detail approaches—avoid or fight.
Follow the tunnel to the Red Knife captain.

title: Transfer Contact
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, orc guard with goblins in tunnel, lantern glare, cinematic, no text
description:
A lantern flares.

An orc squints. "Smell… human."

title: Captain’s Den: Red Knife Varg
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, goblin captain with red cord, crude table with maps and tokens, torch smoke, cinematic, no text
description:
A goblin captain stands over a map scratched into stone.

A red cord hangs at his throat.

"You’re late," he says. "Good. Late means desperate."

choices.label: If you have a ransom token, attempt to parley (short window).

title: Orders and Cord
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, fallen goblin captain, red cord and orders on stone table, cinematic, no text
description:
Varg collapses, still smiling.

You take the red cord and the transfer orders.

The orders mention the city drains like a lover’s name.

choices.label: Move to the second mouth choke-point.

title: Second Mouth Choke-Point
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, narrow choke tunnel with heavy supports, iron wedges, marked pillars, cinematic, no text
description:
A narrow choke tunnel held by thick supports.

Three pillars carry the roof—‘breath pillars,’ as Mip called them.

If this collapses, the enemy loses its second mouth.

But collapse is never polite.

investigate.text: The supports show stress cracks in the chalk dust.

choices.label: Cast Keen Eye to spot the most fragile pillar.
Plant a mine charge and collapse the tunnel (stops infiltration).
Use the ‘breath pillars’ hint to collapse the tunnel (luck check).
Don’t collapse it—leave quietly (enemy keeps the second mouth).

title: Escape: What You Save, What You Lose
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, fleeing through chalk tunnel, distant collapse dust, torchlight fading, cinematic, no text
description:
You move fast, because caves remember footsteps.

If the second mouth stands, the enemy can slip into the drains later.

If it fell, the enemy will be furious—and blind in that direction.

Either way: the city must be told.

choices.label: Return to the city drains and report to the council.

title: Powder Magazine
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, guarded powder magazine doors, warning sigils, rain, torchlight, cinematic, no text
description:
A thick door, two locks, and a guard who looks like he sleeps with his spear.

A sign reads: NO OPEN FLAME.

You notice: someone has scraped wax from a seal recently.

investigate.text: The seal scrapings suggest tampering. If a fuse is already laid, the city might lose the gate before the enemy arrives.

title: Inside the Magazine
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, powder kegs stacked in rows, dim lantern behind shuttered glass, suspicious shadow, cinematic, no text
description:
Rows of kegs. The air is dry and wrong.

A shadow moves between stacks — too careful for a guard.

You catch the faint smell of burned cord: fuse.

choices.label: Step in and confront the intruder.
Quietly soak the fuse with my water skin.

title: Magazine Standoff
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, saboteur with flint and fuse near powder kegs, tense close quarters, cinematic, no text
description:
The intruder turns — a city man, not a goblin. He holds flint and cord like holy objects.

"You shouldn’t be here," he says. "This is bigger than you."

choices.label: Fight him before he lights anything.
Throw a smoke pellet and rush him.

title: A Dirty Confession
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, close-up parley in dim warehouse, nervous saboteur, fuse cord, cinematic, no text
description:
His eyes flick to the kegs.

"It’s not the goblins," he whispers. "It’s… a ‘friend of the docks’. They said the city must ‘change hands’ to survive. They said the gate wards are a lie."

choices.label: Accept his surrender and take evidence.

title: Secured Kegs
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, sealed powder kegs with fresh wax seals, guards arriving, relief and tension, cinematic, no text
description:
Guards arrive, breathless. You point to scraped seals, the fuse cord, the ledger page.

The captain’s messenger blanches. "If this had gone off…"

It didn’t. Not today.

talk.text: A guard captain nods grimly. "Report this to the council. And don’t leave the gate yard once the horns start."

choices.label: Report sabotage evidence to the council.

title: Factor’s Office
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, dock office with ledgers, sealing wax, fine chair, rain at window, cinematic, no text
description:
The office smells of wax, ink, and expensive soap. A man smiles like he’s never been hungry.

Factor Merris stands behind a ledger stack as if it’s a fortress.

talk.text: Merris’s smile is practiced. "I’m very busy."

title: Warrant Executed
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, guards seizing ledgers, factor losing composure, wax seals, cinematic, no text
description:
His composure fractures when the warrant seal catches the light.

"This is absurd—" he begins.

A guard’s hand closes on his shoulder. The ledger pages you take feel heavier than coin.

choices.label: Arrest Merris and seize the ledger pages.

title: Mage Tower: Scrying Chamber
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, crystal ball on pedestal in mage chamber, light swirling, anxious scribes, cinematic, no text
description:
The crystal ball hums like a held breath.

Salenne steadies it with both hands.

Images appear: smoke, a door, water… and a ring stamping black wax on stolen orders.

choices.label: Begin the scrying (learn the night assault and traitor clue).

title: Council Emergency: Three Knives at Once
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, emergency council meeting, maps with three marked targets, lantern light, cinematic, no text
description:
The council marks three points on the city map:

- Granary quarter.
- Postern gate.
- Drains junction.

"They hit all three at once," Vayne says.

"And someone inside stamped the orders."

talk.text: Vayne’s finger rests on the map like a blade.

choices.label: 3. Ambush the Siege Command Tent (cut the head).
Investigate the quartermaster’s ledgers for blackwax seals.

title: Stores Ledger Room: Wax and Numbers
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, ledger room with keys, wax seals, shelves of supplies, tense mood, cinematic, no text
description:
Ledgers. Keys. Wax.

Master of Stores Rell watches you like you’re the thief.

But the scrying showed a ring… and a seal no honest hand should hold.

talk.text: Rell’s mouth is polite; his eyes are not.

choices.label: Leave and focus on the night assault.

title: Confrontation: Blackwax in Hand
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, tense confrontation in ledger room doorway, guard lanterns, a ring glint, cinematic, no text
description:
The ring glints.

A bodyguard shifts closer.

Rell’s voice stays calm: "You’re exhausted. You’re seeing enemies everywhere."

But you can smell pitch on the wax—fresh.

choices.label: 1. Call guards and attempt an arrest.

title: Traitor Resolved
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, guards seizing a ring and wax seal, lanterns, grim faces, cinematic, no text
description:
The ring is taken.

Black wax crumbles under a guard’s thumb.

Whether confession or force, the city has one less knife behind its back.

choices.label: Return to the council’s triage choice.

title: Granary Quarter: Smoke Before Screams
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, granary street at night, smoke pouring from door seams, goblins with tinder, cinematic, no text
description:
The scrying was right.

Smoke leaks from seams.

If the granary burns, winter becomes an enemy too.

choices.label: Fight the fireteam before they ignite the stores.

title: Granary: Fire in the Doorframe
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, close fight at granary door, flames starting, goblins fleeing, cinematic, no text
description:
You can fight them—or smother the flames first.

If you spend time on one, the other worsens.

choices.label: Smother flames with ward chalk + water (luck check).

title: Postern Gate: Breach at Midnight
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, postern gate at night, orc with ram and tools, torches, cinematic, no text
description:
The small gate shudders.

An orc breaker works like a craftsman of destruction.

If this door opens, the city’s back becomes its throat.

title: Postern: Iron on Wood
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, clash at narrow gate, orc breaker snarling, sparks, cinematic, no text
description:
The breaker is close.

If you have barricades installed, the angle is tighter and the ram hits poorly.

If you fail, the breach becomes a flood.

title: Postern Exit: Into the Dark Field
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, slipping out a small gate into fog field, distant camp lights, cinematic, no text
description:
You slip outside the walls.

Camp lights flicker beyond the fog.

If you strike the command tent, you may save the city by confusing the head.

Or die alone in grass.

title: Night Assault Ends
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, exhausted guards at dawn edge, smoke thinning, lanterns dying, cinematic, no text
description:
The night assault fades.

Whatever you saved stands.

Whatever you failed to save will hurt later.

And now the question becomes: do you keep reacting… or do you take the war to them?

choices.label: Begin a counterstrike: infiltrate the siege camp and steal their war standard.

title: Descent: Wet Steps, Old Hate
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, descending sewer stairs, black water below, rune marks, cinematic, no text
description:
The city’s stone sweats above you.

The deeper tunnels feel… shaped.

As if a throat was carved into the earth.

title: Tunnel Clash: Teeth in the Drip
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, tight sewer fight, clawed creature on wall, lantern glare, cinematic, no text
description:
A crawler clings to the wall like a spider.

A fanatic laughs behind it.

If you’re here, you finish this—no more half measures.

title: The Second Mouth: Chamber of Breathing Stone
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, grotesque sewer chamber like a carved throat, water swirling, cult candles, cinematic, no text
description:
Stone curves like ribs.

Water spirals into a dark throat.

A priest stands at the edge, chanting.

This is where the city gets stabbed from within.

title: End It: Collapse or Sanctify
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, cracked stone throat with ward lines glowing, player holding chalk and tools, cinematic, no text
description:
The mouth shudders without the priest’s chant.

You can collapse it with brute force.

Or sanctify it with wardwork so it cannot be reopened.

Both are risky. Both are final.

choices.label: 2) Sanctify the mouth with chalk wards (mind check).

title: Return: The City’s Veins Quiet
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, ascending sewer steps toward lantern light, water calmer, cinematic, no text
description:
The water runs differently now.

Less like breath.

More like water.

If you sealed the mouth, the city is safer from inside.

Now the war becomes simpler: walls, gates, and open steel.

choices.label: Return to the surface and prepare the next counterstrike.

title: Siege Camp Approach: Firelight in Fog
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, fog field with scattered campfires ahead, silhouettes of tents and siege engines, cinematic, no text
description:
Campfires make the fog glow.

Somewhere in that sprawl is the standard that keeps them brave.

Kess waits low in the grass.

talk.text: Kess points toward a darker trench line.

title: Picket Line: Whispering Arrows
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, goblin pickets with bows near stake fence, campfire glow, cinematic, no text
description:
Three goblins watch the fog.

They are bored.

Bored creatures shoot first to feel alive.

choices.label: Use the stolen codebook to fake a recall signal (mind check).

title: Picket Clash
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, arrows in fog, close melee at stake fence, cinematic, no text
description:
The fog turns chaotic.

A goblin screams.

If the camp wakes, the raid becomes a chase.

title: Command Trench Entry
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, trench line with crude boards, lanterns, muffled voices, cinematic, no text
description:
The trench smells of pitch and wet wool.

Orders travel here like disease.

Somewhere below is the ‘vault’ and its banner.

choices.label: Find the tunnel drop leading to the buried vault.

title: Command Tent: Maps on Bloodwood
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, command tent interior, maps, wax seals, helmets, torch smoke, cinematic, no text
description:
Maps. Wax seals. A brass stamping plate.

This is where they decide which streets burn.

Take what you can before footsteps arrive.

title: Tent Contact
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, orc drillmaster entering tent, goblin behind, torch flare, cinematic, no text
description:
The drillmaster fills the entrance.

You don’t have room to run.

You have room to win.

title: Command Tunnels: Chalk and Breath
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, narrow tunnels under camp, dripping earth, lanterns, chalk marks, cinematic, no text
description:
Earth tunnels beneath the trench.

If you get lost, you die quietly.

A vault waits ahead—guarded by something that believes in the banner.

choices.label: Mark the tunnel path with chalk.

title: War-Standard Vault: The Banner That Bites
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, buried vault chamber, black banner on rack, guardian in shadow, cinematic, no text
description:
The banner hangs heavy, as if soaked in fear.

A guardian stands before it.

Not a soldier.

A believer.

title: Banner Taken
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, player lifting heavy black banner, torchlight, shattered rack, cinematic, no text
description:
You take the war standard.

It feels like lifting a piece of the enemy’s spine.

Above, the camp still thinks it is winning.

Not for long.

choices.label: Escape back through the fog to the postern gate.

title: Engine Yard Approach: Wood, Iron, Confidence
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, fog field overlooking enemy engine yard, silhouettes of siege tower and ram, campfires, cinematic, no text
description:
Beyond the fog: the engine yard.

A siege tower like a moving barn.

A ram head that shines wetly.

Pitch pits bubbling like black soup.

Kess crouches beside you.

talk.text: Kess points to weak points like a surgeon.

title: Engine Yard: Patrols and Pulleys
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, enemy engine yard with siege tower wheel frames, pulleys, guards, cinematic, no text
description:
Everything creaks.

Ropes, frames, wheel hubs.

A patrol circles.

To the left: the wheelhouse.
To the right: the pitch pits.
Ahead: cages and a foreman’s platform.

choices.label: Move fast and accept the risk.

title: Choice: What You Break First
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, close view of three targets: wheel hub, ram chain, pitch cauldron, cinematic, no text
description:
Three targets.

Three chances to tilt the final battle.

Pick one to attempt first (you may manage more if you stay alive).

choices.label: 3) Cages: question prisoners / locate foreman keys.

title: Wheelhouse: The Hub That Holds
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, wooden wheelhouse interior, massive wheel hub, grease, lantern, cinematic, no text
description:
The siege tower’s wheel hub is the heart of the machine.

A wedge in the wrong place does nothing.

A wedge in the right place makes a monster limp.

title: Pitch Pits: Black Boil
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, bubbling pitch cauldrons, torchmen, smoke, chains, cinematic, no text
description:
Pitch bubbles like anger.

A torchman watches the ladle.

If you spoil the cauldrons, the enemy loses a terrifying weapon on the wall.

choices.label: Dump sand to ruin the pitch (luck check).

title: Pitch Pit Clash
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, fight near bubbling pitch, torch flare, smoke, cinematic, no text
description:
Smoke bites your lungs.

A torchman swings.

One misstep and the pit becomes your grave.

title: Cage Row: The Enemy’s Labor
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, prisoner cages in rain, guards nearby, desperate faces, cinematic, no text
description:
Cages line the mud.

Carpenters. Haulers. Captured villagers.

A woman with splintered hands whispers:

"Wheelhouse hub. Foreman key. Ram chain."

talk.text: One prisoner meets your eyes and refuses to look away.

choices.label: Take the cage list (proof and future hooks).

title: Foreman’s Platform: The Key and the Chain
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, raised platform with foreman barking orders, key ring at belt, lanterns, cinematic, no text
description:
The foreman watches everything.

A ring of keys hangs at his belt.

A thick chain runs from his platform toward the ram shed.

choices.label: Try to steal the key ring without fighting (luck check).

title: Ram Shed: The Metal Head
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, shed with massive ram head, chains, tools, wet metal shine, cinematic, no text
description:
The ram head sits like a beast’s skull.

Its chain is thick.

If you take it, the gate has a better chance.

If you’re caught, the camp will chase you to the walls.

choices.label: Steal the ram chain and disable the ram (mind check).

title: Escape: Mud and Whistles
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, sprinting through fog with stolen chain over shoulder, lanterns behind, cinematic, no text
description:
Whistles rise behind you.

Boots splash.

If you make it back with even one sabotage, the final battle changes.

If you made all three… the war might end today.

choices.label: Return to the city with what you stole/broke.

title: Under-Fortress Entry: The Throat of Stone
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, descending stone throat tunnel, wet walls, lantern in darkness, cinematic, no text
description:
The air changes.

Colder.

Older.

The walls feel shaped by hands that hated daylight.

Ahead: faint torchlight, and the sound of distant iron on stone.

choices.label: Follow the torchlight toward voices (possible market).
Take the narrower route toward a guardpost (riskier, faster).

title: Goblin Market: Quiet Violence
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, underground market with goblins trading, hanging lanterns, strange coins, guarded stalls, cinematic, no text
description:
A market in the dark.

Not friendly.

Just functional.

You can buy information with undercoin, trade favors, or start a fight that turns the whole cavern against you.

choices.label: Trade for Bonewhite Undercoin (requires a city coin sacrifice).
Investigate whispers of ‘a princess’ and ‘a crystal key’.

title: Guardpost: Iron and Habit
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, underground guardpost with iron bars and torchlight, disciplined captain silhouette, cinematic, no text
description:
A disciplined captain holds this post.

Not a goblin.

A hobgoblin trying to make retreat look like strategy.

Without a banner, he uses fear instead.

title: Choice: What Ends the War Faster
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, underground crossroads with two carved doorways, rune-lit paths, cinematic, no text
description:
Two paths are offered by rumor and necessity:

1) Prisoner Vault — captives (and a princess) used as leverage.
2) Crystal Nexus — the enemy’s war-sight, their hidden advantage.

Both matter.

But you can’t do everything before they adapt.

choices.label: 2) Go to the Crystal Nexus (seize war-sight).

title: Prisoner Vault: The Caged Promise
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, underground prison corridor, iron doors, muffled cries, lantern reflection, cinematic, no text
description:
Iron doors. Old locks.

You smell fear.

If you promised to look for captives, this is where promises become real—or become shame.

choices.label: Attempt to open the cell block (mind check).

title: Prison Choice: Save Many or Save One
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, prison junction with two doors, one ornate, one crowded with hands through bars, cinematic, no text
description:
Two doors:

- The crowded cells (many captives).
- The ornate cell (a high-value prisoner — ‘princess’ by rumor).

Time is a weapon.

Choose.

choices.label: 1) Free the many (city morale, future allies).

title: Crystal Nexus: The Enemy’s Sight
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, crystal-lined tunnel, pale glow, runes, cold mist, cinematic, no text
description:
Crystal threads the stone.

You feel it in your teeth.

If the enemy has war-sight, they will always strike first.

Unless you take it.

title: Nexus Chamber: Turn the Tide
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, large crystal chamber with sealed dais, keyhole glowing, reflections like stars, cinematic, no text
description:
The chamber hums.

This is not treasure.

This is advantage.

You can claim it, shatter it, or re-tune it to feed the city instead.

choices.label: 3) Re-tune it for the city (mind check).

title: Return Route: Veteran Steps
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, climbing back through tunnels toward faint daylight, lantern low, cinematic, no text
description:
You return with something the enemy didn’t expect:

- freed captives,
- political leverage,
- or a stolen advantage made of crystal.

You are no longer a novice.

You are a factor.

choices.label: Begin the next chapter: Mountain Fortress and the War’s True Heart.

title: Underfortress Entry Hall
text: A vast under-hall opens beneath the fort. Rune-carved pillars rise like ribs from the floor; cold torchlight catches in dust and sigils.
imagePrompt: A cavernous subterranean hall with rune-carved pillars, cold torchlight, drifting dust and a hush of long-remembered rites.

choices.text: Force open an inner vault door

title: Reliquary Chamber
text: The chamber hums with low power. On a central plinth an iron-latticed reliquary holds a pale, humming artifact — its glow a living thing.
imagePrompt: A circular reliquary chamber with a central plinth holding a glowing artifact encased in iron, sigils etched into the stone.

choices.text: Leave the relic and search the perimeter

title: Archon Vault
text: A sealed vault stands sentry beneath gears and warding runes. Something moves in the dark — a warding construct waking to its old purpose.
imagePrompt: A sealed stone vault guarded by a mechanical warding archon: gears, arcane filaments and a brooding, metallic silhouette.

title: Reliquary Throne
text: At the underfortress' heart a throne holds a husk bound in wards. The relics that circle it hum with memory and coercive intent.
imagePrompt: An ancient throne in dim light, surrounded by reliquary artifacts and binding runes that pulse faintly with power.

choices.text: Destroy the bindings and free the spirit

title: Under-Fortress: Entry Corridor
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, underground fortress corridor, iron sconces, damp stone, distant marching, cinematic, no text
description:
The corridor is built for marching, not living.

Torch soot stains the ceiling. The stonework is older than the current war — and it remembers other wars.

Ahead: a junction and a prison bell.

actions.successText: Boot scuffs show a heavy traffic pattern. Something important moves through here on schedule.
actions.failureText: You search the corridor but find nothing of particular interest—just old stonework and torch soot.

title: Junction of Iron Sconces
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, underground junction with two paths, torch sconces, shadows, cinematic, no text
description:
Two corridors split.

Left: louder — voices, keys, the stink of prisoners.
Right: quieter — a drip, a cistern echo, and the smell of damp rope.

A patrol turns the corner—prepare for trouble.

choices.label: If Muffle Steps is active, slip past the nearest patrol shadow.
A patrol turns the corner—prepare for trouble.

title: Patrol Contact
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, orc guard and goblin runner patrol, lantern, tense moment, cinematic, no text
description:
An orc guard and two goblin runners swing a lantern toward you.

One goblin opens its mouth to shout.

choices.label: Shoot the goblin runner before it raises the alarm.
Use a smoke pellet and slip into the prison antechamber.
Follow the blood trail east to finish the wounded goblin.

title: Blood Trail
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, wounded goblin limping in dark corridor, blood trail, desperate escape, cinematic, no text
description:
A trail of dark blood leads down the corridor.

You hear labored breathing and the scrape of claws on stone ahead.

The wounded goblin limps forward, clutching its side.

choices.label: Finish the wounded goblin before it escapes.

title: Prison Antechamber
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, prison antechamber with key hooks, barred door, dripping stone, cinematic, no text
description:
Hooks on the wall where keys should hang.

A barred door ahead. A ledger desk to the side.

Ink stains and a faint wax seal imprint — recent.

investigate.text: The desk ledger lists prisoners by number, not name. One entry is circled twice: ‘VALE — transfer pending.’

open.text: The barred door to the cell block is locked.

title: Prison Cells
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, dungeon cell corridor, barred cells, prisoners in shadow, torchlight, cinematic, no text
description:
Barred doors line the corridor.

A woman’s voice cuts through the dark: "Don’t rattle the bars. Listen first."

talk.text: You find the speaker: a noble courier with torn cloak and steady eyes.

choices.label: If her cell is open, free Liora and move.

title: Cell Block End
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, end of prison corridor, cracked stone, old drain slit, cinematic, no text
description:
The corridor ends in cracked stone and an old drain slit.

It’s narrow — but it goes somewhere.

You hear drums deeper in the fortress. Not here. Not yet.

title: Drain Slit
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, narrow maintenance slit behind cistern, squeezing through stone gap, cinematic, no text
description:
You squeeze sideways through stone.

Cold water runs over your boots.

Beyond: a maintenance passage that smells of rope and iron.

title: Chain Gallery
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, underground chain gallery with pulleys, massive chains, dripping water, cinematic, no text
description:
Massive chains run through pulleys.

A chalk mark: ‘TRANSFER ROUTE →’ and a crude skull.

This is infrastructure — and infrastructure is always guarded.

choices.label: Cast Muffle Steps to cross the chain gallery quietly.

title: Hound Contact
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, troll-hound baring teeth, goblin handler, chain shadows, cinematic, no text
description:
A troll-hound lowers its head and growls.

A goblin handler grins. "SMELL HUMAN."

choices.label: Spill oil and throw it to distract the hound.

title: Jailer’s Gallery
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, jailer station with keyrings and whip, prisoner ledger, torchlight, cinematic, no text
description:
Keyrings hang like trophies.

A heavy orc in a stained apron turns slowly.

"Lost?" the jailer rumbles. "Everyone’s lost down here. It’s why we keep them."

choices.label: Offer a Prison Ring Token for passage (if you have one).

title: Keyring Taken
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, fallen jailer, keys spilled, torchlight, cinematic, no text
description:
The jailer drops like a sack of iron.

You take the key — and a small black-stone splinter humming with ward energy.

Somewhere deeper, a horn answers another horn.

title: Supply Lift Platform
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, creaking lift platform over dark shaft, chains, torchlight, cinematic, no text
description:
A lift platform hangs over a black shaft.

Crates are marked with crude runes: FOOD. IRON. PRISON.

One mark is newer: RELIQUARY.

title: Escape Route Choice
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, two routes in underground corridor, one lit by torches, one narrow and dark, cinematic, no text
description:
With the VIP freed, every corridor feels louder.

You must choose: speed, or stealth.

choices.label: Take the faster torch-lit route (risk patrols).
Slip via the drain slit and chain gallery (safer, slower).

title: Reliquary Stairs
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, descending stairs with old carvings, relic motifs, torch soot, cinematic, no text
description:
Stairs descend into older stone.

Carvings show a sphere held over a battlefield — armies moving like pieces.

The ‘sight orb’ isn’t a rumor. It’s a weapon.

choices.label: Proceed into Under-Fortress Scenario II: The Deep Reliquary.

title: Deep Reliquary: Antechamber
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, ancient reliquary antechamber, carved sphere motifs, ward lines glowing faintly, cinematic, no text
description:
The stone here is older and cleaner. Carvings show a sphere hovering over battle lines.

Thin ward lines thread the walls like veins.

A plaque in rough script: ‘SIGHT MAKES KINGS.’

investigate.text: Some ward lines are scuffed, as if boots intentionally avoided them.

choices.label: Cast Keen Eye to identify the safe path.

title: Ward Hall: Threaded Stone
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, corridor with glowing ward threads on floor, skull carvings, tense, cinematic, no text
description:
Ward threads cross the floor like a net.

Step wrong and the net tightens.

choices.label: If you have a Reliquary Pass Mark, follow the marked safe route.
Use a Ward Damper to dull the trap lines.

title: Reliquary Cells
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, small cells near reliquary, runes on bars, mage in chains, cinematic, no text
description:
Smaller cells, newer bars, better locks.

A young mage apprentice looks up. Runes glow on her wrists like shackles made of light.

talk.text: The apprentice’s eyes flash with stubborn clarity.

choices.label: Talk to Tess of the Tower.

title: Service Sluice
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, hidden sluice tunnel with trickling water, narrow ledge, maintenance hooks, cinematic, no text
description:
A narrow maintenance sluice runs beside trickling water.

It bypasses the ward hall — but it’s cramped and loud if you slip.

choices.label: Cast Muffle Steps before climbing the ledge.

title: Orb Cradle Room
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, reliquary chamber with orb cradle pedestal, rune rings, guards, eerie glow, cinematic, no text
description:
A pedestal holds an empty cradle — ringed by runes.

The orb was here. Recently.

A wax smear on the rim suggests it was sealed for transport.

investigate.text: The cradle’s ring is cracked in one spot—intentional weak point, like a hinge for removal.

choices.label: Take a chunk of reliquary seal wax as proof.

title: Convoy Intercept Gallery
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, corridor where convoy passes, crate on cart, guards, ward adept, cinematic, no text
description:
Boots. Wheels. A murmured chant.

The convoy approaches: a cart under canvas, guards tight, a ward adept watching the shadows.

If the orb is on that cart, this is your moment.

choices.label: Wait in shadow and look for a defecting adept.

title: Adept in the Dark
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, nervous adept stepping from shadow, ward charm cracking, cinematic, no text
description:
A hooded figure steps from a recess.

"If you’re going to strike," he whispers, "do it clean. They’ll kill me when it’s moved."

talk.text: He glances both ways, shaking.

title: Canvas and Candlelight
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, ambush moment, canvas-covered cart, guard lantern swinging, cinematic, no text
description:
The cart is within reach.

The ward adept’s eyes flick to the floor, counting steps. The guards’ grips tighten.

You can take the orb… or make sure nobody uses it soon.

choices.label: If you learned the cradle weakness, sabotage the cart cradle and flee (orb delayed).

title: The Orb Revealed
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, canvas pulled back revealing crystal orb glowing, reflections like armies, cinematic, no text
description:
Under the canvas: the crystal orb.

Inside it, lights move like troops on a map.

You feel the urge to look longer — and the fear that it’s looking back.

choices.label: Don’t carry it—take proof and flee (orb remains, but you have evidence).

title: Commander’s Chamber
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, command chamber with crude map table, torches, orc commander turning, cinematic, no text
description:
A heavy door opens onto a command space.

An orc commander turns from a map table.

"Thief," he says calmly. "Good. I wanted to see the one who thought they could."

choices.label: If you have smoke, escape instead of fighting.

title: Signet and Routes
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, fallen commander, signet ring gleaming, torn route map, cinematic, no text
description:
Kargan falls hard.

You take his signet and a torn route sketch.

One scribble stands out: ‘BREAKWATER TUNNEL → CAVES → CITY DRAINS.’

A way out.

title: Breakwater Tunnel
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, rushing underground water tunnel, narrow ledges, torchlight fading, cinematic, no text
description:
A water tunnel roars like an animal.

The ledge is narrow. The air tastes like wet stone.

If you’re carrying the orb, every step feels louder.

choices.label: Use glow chalk to mark your route for the return.
Follow the tunnel back into the limestone caves.

title: Caves Return: Cold Air, New Weight
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, cave mouth with fresher air, distant city glow, exhausted adventurer, cinematic, no text
description:
You emerge into caves again.

Somewhere far above: a city clinging to its walls.

If the orb is with you, you’re carrying the future. If not, you’re carrying proof and a plan.

choices.label: Return toward the city drains to report to the council.

title: City Drain Return
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, sewer arch leading to hidden city hatch, lantern glow, rain sounds above, cinematic, no text
description:
The hatch above is a promise: back to streets, back to politics, back to the war.

And now you have something the enemy wanted badly enough to hide underground.

choices.label: Report to Councilor Vayne (next chapter: planning the counterstroke).

title: Lair Threshold: Old Air, New Lies
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, ancient threshold with runes, cavern beyond, torchlight, cinematic, no text
description:
The door closes behind you with the patience of stone.

This place is older than the war.

But it has learned the war’s language.

You feel watched—not by eyes, but by outcomes.

choices.label: Enter the lair and finish this.

title: Guard Gate: Chains and Warders
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, lair gate with chains and ward glyphs, cult warders, hulking ogre, cinematic, no text
description:
A warded gate.

Two warders chant.

An ogre waits like a boulder that hates you.

If you have ward nails, you might disrupt the chant.

Otherwise: steel.

choices.label: Disrupt the ward chant with ward nails (mind check).

title: Gate Fight: Break the Lock by Force
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, brutal fight at rune gate, chains snapping, ogre swing, cinematic, no text
description:
A warder raises a hand.

The ogre swings.

Win, and the lair opens.

Lose, and you become another lesson built into the stone.

title: Oracle Antechamber: The War’s Quiet Room
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, quiet chamber with hanging chains and crystal reflections, eerie calm, cinematic, no text
description:
Silence here isn’t peace.

It’s a held breath.

A crystal reflection shows you moving a half-second before you do.

That’s when you understand: the enemy isn’t only strong.

It’s *informed*.

choices.label: Push on before it learns you.

title: Overseer Chamber: The Warbrain Keeper
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, boss chamber with war map tablet, overseer with crystal-studded staff, oracle chains in background, cinematic, no text
description:
The Overseer doesn’t roar.

It *calculates*.

A Heartspike relic hums in its grip.

Behind it, chains descend into a deeper chamber.

That’s where the oracle is kept.

title: Oracle Chamber: Chains of Advantage
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, chained oracle fused with crystal, runes glowing, water dripping, solemn mood, cinematic, no text
description:
The oracle is not a treasure.

It is a prisoner forced to make wars efficient.

If you claimed or retuned the Crystal Nexus earlier, the chamber responds to you.

If you shattered it, the chamber feels… blind.

The oracle lifts its eyes.

talk.text: The oracle offers truth with a cost.

choices.label: 1) Destroy the oracle’s war-sight (end the advantage forever).
2) Free the oracle (risk: it may leave or demand repayment).
3) Rebind the oracle for the city (powerful, morally sharp).

title: Aftermath: The War Tilts
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, cavern exit with dawn light, broken chains, map tablet in hand, cinematic, no text
description:
You leave with proof:

- a war-map tablet,
- chain links,
- and a decision that changes the next year of history.

If you rescued many captives earlier, allies now whisper your name with trust.

If you rescued a high-value prisoner, the council will move like a blade.

If you took or retuned the nexus, magic will shift toward you.

The war will not end quietly.

But it may end *soon*.

choices.label: Return to the city for the Veteran Council Finale (titles, betrayals, final campaign hook).
Begin the last hunt: chase the enemy warlord to the final fortress-heart (campaign climax).

title: War Room: Candle Smoke and Cold Decisions
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, candlelit war room, maps pinned, exhausted council, rain at windows, cinematic, no text
description:
The council chamber is not a throne room.

It is a sickbed for the city.

Maps are pinned like wounds.

People argue like surgeons.

You enter and the room sharpens.

choices.label: Begin the Knife Room council session.

title: Vayne’s Hearing: Choose Two Before Dawn
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, councilor addressing room, sealed evidence on table, cinematic, no text
description:
Vayne leans on the table.

"You can do only two things before dawn.

- Prepare the Warlord Hunt.
- Root out the traitor.
- Stabilise the streets.

Pick.

And live with it."

talk.text: The council is a battlefield without blood—until there is.

title: Armoury: Heirloom or Supplies
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, armoury racks, named weapons on table, guildmaster smith, cinematic, no text
description:
Orrow offers you a choice:

- Upgrade one named weapon into an heirloom.
- Or take extra supplies for the hunt.

A veteran knows the difference between strength and endurance.

talk.text: Orrow can make a legend out of steel.

title: Archive Thread: The Smell of Blackwax
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, shadowy archives with ledgers and seals, master warden, cinematic, no text
description:
Master Warden Sell pulls down a ledger bound in blackwax.

"This is where betrayals live," he says.

"They hide in numbers and polite signatures."

talk.text: Sell offers truth with consequences.

title: Street Crisis: Rumours Become Knives
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, tense city street at night, watch lanterns, frightened crowd, cinematic, no text
description:
The city hasn’t slept since the siege.

Rumours run faster than messengers.

A spark in the wrong district becomes a riot.

Mirelda offers a decree.

The streets wait to see if you’ll be kind—or strong.

talk.text: Mirelda wants authority to keep order.

choices.label: Issue a Decree of Safe Conduct (cost: major seal).
Return to the council without intervening.

title: Assassin Interrupt: Truth Bleeds
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, assassin lunging among shelves of ledgers, candle flare, cinematic, no text
description:
As you touch the ledger, the candle snuffs.

A whisper behind you:

"Put it back."

choices.label: Chase the assassin into the streets (risk losing the ledger).

title: Return: Dawn Approaches
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, council doors with dawn light leaking under, cinematic, no text
description:
You return to the war room.

Dawn is not gentle.

It exposes what you chose—and what you didn’t.

title: Council Chamber: Maps and Candles
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, city council chamber, war maps, candles, exhausted officials, cinematic, no text
description:
War maps cover the table. Wax drips like slow blood.

Councilor Vayne waits with a quill.

Outside: the city breathes smoke and relief.

talk.text: The council is ready to hear what you changed.

choices.label: Deliver your report and receive judgment.

title: Infirmary: Triage by Lantern
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, crowded infirmary, healers working by lantern light, raincoats steaming, cinematic, no text
description:
Bandages, lanterns, and prayers.

Sister Elin doesn’t look up. "If you’re not bleeding, you’re useful."

talk.text: Elin points to a slate of locations marked in charcoal.

choices.label: Take a hotspot report and head into the smoke.
The inquisitor requests you at the holding cells.

title: Burnt Quarter: Smoke and Embers
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, smoky street with burning timber, civilians carrying buckets, guards shouting, cinematic, no text
description:
Smoke stings your eyes.

If infiltrators slipped through, they left tinder behind.

You can save buildings—or chase shadows.

choices.label: Smother fires and stabilize the quarter (good outcome).
You arrive too late — the fire spreads (city damage increases).

title: Holding Cells: Lantern and Ink
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, narrow holding cells, hooded inquisitor, frightened captive goblin, cinematic, no text
description:
The air smells of iron and ink.

Inquisitor Dran folds his sleeves.

"We need a location. A name. A route."

talk.text: Dran gestures toward a shaking goblin courier.

title: Memorial Square: Quiet After Screams
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, memorial square with candles and cloaked bodies, guard lanterns, solemn rain, cinematic, no text
description:
Cloaks over bodies.

Candles gutter in rain.

This is the bill the city pays when enemies step inside the walls.

title: Postern Gate: A Thin Door in a Thick Wall
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, small hidden city gate at night, guards with lanterns, beyond is foggy field, cinematic, no text
description:
A small gate—barely more than a slit.

The confession names a relay point: a captured watchfort beyond the siege line.

Strike it, and the enemy’s coordination falters.

Fail, and you won’t make it back to this door.

choices.label: Begin the counterstrike: go beyond the walls to the captured watchfort.

title: No-Man’s Land: Low Fog and Old Stakes
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, foggy field with broken stakes and distant watchfort silhouette, moonlight, cinematic, no text
description:
Fog turns distance into lies.

Ahead: the captured watchfort, a black tooth against the sky.

A city scout waits in the grass.

talk.text: Lieutenant Kess keeps their voice low.

choices.label: Approach the watchfort through the fog.

title: Watchfort Approach: Ditch and Wall
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, stone watchfort with ditch, crude banners, sentries with lanterns, cinematic, no text
description:
A shallow ditch circles the fort.

Sentries pace the parapet.

You can try a quiet climb, or bait patrols away.

choices.label: Use rope & grapnel to reach a blind section of wall.

title: Outer Patrol Contact
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, patrol lanterns flaring in fog, orc sentinel and goblin scouts, cinematic, no text
description:
Lantern light snaps toward you.

An orc sentinel snorts and reaches for a horn.

You have one clean moment.

choices.label: Shoot the horn-bearer, then retreat into cover.

title: Outer Wall Top
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, wallwalk above ditch, wet stone, crude banners, moonlit, cinematic, no text
description:
You pull yourself onto wet stone.

Below: the courtyard.

Ahead: the relay tower, a thinner silhouette against the sky.

choices.label: Move along the wall to the gatehouse.

title: Gatehouse: Broken Portcullis
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, gatehouse interior, broken portcullis, guard benches, torchlight, cinematic, no text
description:
The portcullis is half-lowered—jammed.

A good place to open from within.

A bad place to be discovered.

title: Gatehouse Contact
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, two orc sentinels entering gatehouse, lantern glare, cinematic, no text
description:
Two orcs step in.

One sniffs the air.

If they shout, the whole fort wakes.

title: Courtyard: Mud and Orders
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, muddy courtyard, stacked crates, prisoners' pen visible, relay tower looming, cinematic, no text
description:
Crates stamped with siege marks.

A prisoners’ pen sits under a torch.

The relay tower rises above it all—where signals become slaughter.

investigate.text: A slate map lies under a weight-stone.

title: Prisoners’ Pen: Chain and Breath
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, prisoners behind bars, huge chained troll guarding, torch smoke, cinematic, no text
description:
A troll on a chain.

It doesn’t look smart.

It looks patient.

Behind it: prisoners—alive, barely.

talk.text: A sergeant grips the bars.

choices.label: Bait the troll into the corner, then slip the lock (luck check).

title: Pen Aftermath
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, fallen troll chain slack, prisoners stepping out, cinematic, no text
description:
The chain slackens.

The prisoners move like people remembering how to be alive.

Bram nods once. "Now hit their tower."

title: Armory: Old City Workmanship
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, cramped armory with racks, city-made hinges, hidden hatch outline, cinematic, no text
description:
Racks of mixed gear.

City-made hinges—old quality.

Behind a rack, you see it: an outline of a sally hatch.

choices.label: Open the hidden sally hatch (escape route).

title: Relay Tower Base
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, stone tower stairwell, horn racks, lantern hooks, ominous climb, cinematic, no text
description:
Horn racks on the wall.

Lantern hooks at measured intervals.

This is where signals become orders.

title: Relay Tower Top: The Banner Captain
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, tower top with signal lanterns, horn, banner captain poised, storm sky, cinematic, no text
description:
Lanterns. Horns. A banner captain.

Their hands are steady.

If they sound the wrong pattern, the next dawn at your city wall will be worse.

choices.label: Attempt to steal the codebook without a full fight (mind check).

title: Signals Broken
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, fallen banner captain, codebook in hand, lanterns dimmed, cinematic, no text
description:
The tower feels quieter.

Not peaceful—just less coordinated.

You take the codebook. You take the future away from their hands.

choices.label: Escape the watchfort (use the hidden hatch if found).

title: Escape Tunnel: Cold Air, Fast Feet
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, narrow escape tunnel, distant torchlight behind, breath fog, cinematic, no text
description:
A thin tunnel leading back toward the fog field.

If you’re quick, you vanish.

If you’re slow, you become a lesson.

choices.label: Return to the postern gate with prisoners and codebook.

title: The Outer Falls: Water in a Throat of Stone
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, hidden waterfall inside mountain cistern, spray and lantern light, narrow ledge behind falls, cinematic, no text
description:
A waterfall inside the mountain.

Spray steals light.

But behind the curtain of water, a ledge runs into darkness.

This is not natural.

This is a door that pretends to be stone.

choices.label: Wrap your torch against the spray (if available).
Go behind the falls with an unprotected flame (risk).

title: Behind the Falls: Slippery Truth
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, narrow ledge behind waterfall, hands gripping stone, spray, cinematic, no text
description:
The ledge is thin.

The drop is honest.

You can move carefully, or move fast and risk it.

A faint vibration in the stone suggests something ‘listens’ deeper in.

choices.label: Move fast to beat patrol timing (luck check).

title: Echo Chamber: The Cave Hears You
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, cavern echo chamber with wet stone and ripples, lantern reflections, bats swirling, cinematic, no text
description:
Your steps return to you a heartbeat later.

Echoes stack.

If you make noise, something will answer.

You can distract with an echo-stone, or proceed and accept what follows.

choices.label: Throw an echo-stone to mislead whatever listens.

title: Guardian Turn: Bats, Slime, or Listener
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, tunnel fork with shadowy movement, slime sheen and bat silhouettes, cinematic, no text
description:
The cave presents three dangers like a test:

- A bat swarm in a low tunnel.
- A slime slick in a wet crawl.
- A deeper passage where the stone seems to listen.

Pick your poison.

choices.label: Take the listening passage (harder, better rewards).

title: Hidden Door: Stone That Pretends
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, hidden stone door with faint seams, crystal shard glow, cinematic, no text
description:
A door disguised as rock.

If you have a Shard of Listening, it vibrates at the seam.

Beyond it: old air, and the sense you’re about to step into the war’s true heart.

choices.label: Open the hidden door (mind check; easier with shard).

title: Market Square
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, bustling medieval market square under war banners, ration queues, militia patrols, cinematic, no text
description:
War has changed the market. There are still apples and bolts of cloth, but now there are ration lines and whispered prices.

Runners weave between carts. A bell tolls from the direction of the council hall.

title: Docks Ward
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, rainy medieval docks ward, tarpaulins, lantern light, wary dockhands, cinematic, no text
description:
The docks never sleep — they just change what they’re guilty of.

Tarpaulins snap in the wind. Lanterns show too many shadows moving in the wrong direction.

title: Drain Grate
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, iron drain grate in cobbles, runoff water, faint green light below, cinematic, no text
description:
The grate is newer than the stones around it. Someone has been here recently — the bolts are scratched and the iron is warm.

A smell rises: rot, river-mud, and secrets.

title: Outer Gate
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, massive city outer gate with iron bands, soldiers and barricades, storm clouds, cinematic, no text
description:
The outer gate is a mouth held shut by fear and iron.

Beyond it: fields, farms, timber tracks — and whatever is bold enough to test the walls.

title: Grain Store
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, city granary interior, stacked sacks, dust motes in light beams, nervous clerks, cinematic, no text
description:
Sacks are stacked like miniature fortifications. A clerk watches you as if you might steal the concept of bread.

Outside, someone shouts that another cart is overdue.

title: Farm Road Edge
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, muddy farm road leaving the city, hedges, distant scarecrows, watchful sky, cinematic, no text
description:
The city shrinks behind you. Ahead: hedges, fields, and the uneasy quiet that comes before trouble.

The road forks toward farms and timber tracks.

title: Ditch Path
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, narrow ditch path with wet reeds, footprints, low fog, cinematic, no text
description:
A narrow path runs along a drainage ditch. The reeds are bent the wrong way — like something pushed through in a hurry.

It’s good cover. It’s also a good place to get cornered.

title: Timber Track
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, timber track with cut logs, axe marks, distant treeline, cinematic, no text
description:
The track is chewed up by carts. Fresh axe chips glitter like pale coins.

If raiders wanted lumber, they’d come this way. If you wanted to ambush someone, you’d wait here.

title: Hedge Crossing
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, hedgerow gap with broken branches, muddy bootprints, crows watching, cinematic, no text
description:
A break in the hedge — too neat to be natural.

The ground is churned by boots. Whoever came through wasn’t strolling.

title: Siege Workshop
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, siege workshop with winches, gears, pitch pots, carpenters and smiths, cinematic, no text
description:
Every tool here is a reply to a future scream.

Winches, beams, pitch pots — the city’s hands are building what its mouth refuses to say out loud.

title: Crawlspace Entrance
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, narrow stone crawlspace entrance, dusty, forgotten passage, torch light fading, cinematic, no text
description:
Your silent footsteps led you past the patrol. Ahead, a narrow gap in the stonework—barely wide enough for a person.

Dust swirls as you approach. This passage hasn't been used in years.

title: Tight Crawl
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, very narrow stone tunnel, claustrophobic, rough walls, darkness ahead, cinematic, no text
description:
The walls press close. Stone scrapes your shoulders as you squeeze through.

You hear skittering sounds ahead—something lives down here.

title: Forgotten Cavern
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, natural cave formation, stalactites, old bones, ancient treasure pile, cinematic, no text
description:
The crawlspace opens into a natural cavern. Stalactites drip overhead.

In the center: a pile of old bones, rotted cloth, and the glint of metal. Something valuable lies here.

actions.label: 🔍 Search the bone pile
actions.successText: You find some useful items hidden among the remains!
actions.failureText: The bones crumble as you search. Nothing useful here.

title: Blind Cave Snake Lair
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, dark cave with massive pale snake coiled on rocks, blind white eyes, menacing, cinematic, no text
description:
A massive pale serpent lies coiled in the darkness. Its milky eyes are blind, but it senses your vibrations.

It raises its head and hisses—a guardian that has killed many who sought the treasure beyond.

title: Hidden Treasure Chamber
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, small cave chamber with ancient chest, coins, weapons, magical glow, cinematic, no text
description:
Beyond the snake's lair lies a small chamber. An ancient chest sits open, already looted by whoever left those bones behind.

But there's still treasure here—a small leather bag containing smoke pellets, a short bow, and a quiver of arrows.

effects.text:
🎁 You found:
• Smoke Pellets x10
• Short Bow
• Quiver of Arrows

title: Cistern Run
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, ancient cistern tunnel, knee-deep water, mossy stone, torch reflections, cinematic, no text
description:
Water whispers along stonework older than the city.

Footprints smear in the algae — recent. Someone has been using the cistern runs as a road.
